Bid History Page - Template file: templates/bid_history.html - Page Title: Bid History - IDs and Elements:   - div id="bid-history-page"   - table id="bids-table" (columns: bid ID, auction name, bidder, amount, timestamp)   - select id="filter-by-auction"   - button id="sort-by-amount"   - button id="back-to-dashboard" - Context variables:   - bids: List[Dict[str, Any]]   - selected_auction_id: Optional[int]  ### 6. Auction Categories Page - Template file: templates/categories.html - Page Title: Auction Categories - IDs and Elements:   - div id="categories-page"   - div id="categories-list"   - div id="category-card-{{ category.category_id }}" (for each category)   - button id="view-category-button-{{ category.category_id }}"   - button id="back-to-dashboard" - Context variables:   - categories: List[Dict[str, Any]]  ### 7. Winners Page - Template file: templates/winners.html - Page Title: Winning Items - IDs and Elements:   - div id="winners-page"   - div id="winners-list"   - div id="winner-card-{{ winner.auction_id }}" (for each winner)   - input id="filter-by-winner"   - button id="back-to-dashboard" - Context variables:   - winners: List[Dict[str, Any]]   - filter_name: Optional[str]  ### 8. Trending Auctions Page - Template file: templates/trending.html - Page Title: Trending Auctions - IDs and Elements:   - div id="trending-page"   - div id="trending-list"   - select id="time-range-filter"   - buttons with ids "view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}"   - button id="back-to-dashboard" - Context variables:   - trending_auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]]   - time_range: str  ### 9. Auction Status Page - Template file: templates/status.html - Page Title: Auction Status - IDs and Elements:   - div id="status-page"   - select id="status-filter"   - table id="status-table" (columns: auction name, status, time remaining, current bid)   - button id="refresh-status-button"   - button id="back-to-dashboard" - Context variables:   - auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]]   - status_filter: Optional[str]  ---  ## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)  All files are stored in `data/` directory and pipe-delimited (|) with no header line.  ### auctions.txt - **Fields:** auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | description (str) | category (str) | starting_bid (float) | current_bid (float) | end_time (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) | status (str) | image_url (str) - **Description:** Stores details of auction items. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|Vintage Leather Watch|Antique leather wristwatch from the 1950s|Collectibles|25.00|45.50|2025-02-15 18:00|Active|watch.jpg 2|iPhone 14 Pro|Latest Apple smartphone in excellent condition|Electronics|500.00|620.00|2025-02-10 12:00|Active|iphone.jpg 3|Wooden Desk|Beautiful oak wood desk with original finish|Furniture|75.00|110.00|2025-02-08 20:00|Closed|desk.jpg ```  ### categories.txt - **Fields:** category_id (int) | category_name (str) | description (str) | item_count (int) - **Description:** Stores auction categories and counts. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|Electronics|Digital devices and gadgets|15 2|Collectibles|Rare and valuable collector items|28 3|Furniture|Household furniture and decor|12 ```  ### bids.txt - **Fields:** bid_id (int) | auction_id (int) | bidder_name (str) | bid_amount (float) | bid_timestamp (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) - **Description:** Stores bids placed on auctions. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|1|Alice Johnson|45.50|2025-02-05 14:30 2|2|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45 3|3|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-04 10:15 ```  ### winners.txt - **Fields:** winner_id (int) | auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | winner_name (str) | winning_bid (float) | win_date (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD) - **Description:** Stores winners of auctions. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|3|Wooden Desk|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-08 2|5|Victorian Mirror|Diana Prince|95.00|2025-02-03 3|7|Vintage Books Set|Eve Stewart|150.00|2025-02-01 ```  ### bid_history.txt - **Fields:** history_id (int) | auction_id (int) | auction_name (str) | bidder_name (str) | bid_amount (float) | bid_timestamp (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) - **Description:** Historical record of bids. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Alice Johnson|40.00|2025-02-05 13:00 2|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Frank Miller|42.50|2025-02-05 13:45 3|2|iPhone 14 Pro|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45 ```  ### items.txt - **Fields:** item_id (int) | auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | starting_price (float) | category (str) | condition (str) | seller_name (str) - **Description:** Stores details about auction items including condition and seller information. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|25.00|Collectibles|Excellent|John Collector 2|2|iPhone 14 Pro|500.00|Electronics|Like New|Tech Store 3|3|Wooden Desk|75.00|Furniture|Good|Antique Shop ```  ### trending.txt - **Fields:** auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | bid_count (int) | current_bid (float) | trending_rank (int) | time_period (str) - **Description:** Stores auction trending data. - **Example rows:** ``` 2|iPhone 14 Pro|12|620.00|1|This Week 1|Vintage Leather Watch|8|45.50|2|This Week 5|Vintage Camera|6|85.00|3|This Week ```  ---  End of specification.

status_filter: str (optional)                                                                    |  ---  ## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification (Frontend)  ### 1. Dashboard Page - Template file: templates/dashboard.html - Page Title: Auction Dashboard - IDs and Elements:   - div id="dashboard-page"   - div id="featured-auctions"   - button id="browse-auctions-button" (navigates to auction_catalog function)   - button id="view-bids-button" (navigates to bid_history function)   - button id="trending-auctions-button" (navigates to trending_auctions function) - Context variables:   - featured_auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str)  ### 2. Auction Catalog Page - Template file: templates/catalog.html - Page Title: Auction Catalog - IDs and Elements:   - div id="catalog-page"   - input id="search-input" (text input for search)   - select id="category-filter" (dropdown for category filter)   - div id="auctions-grid" (grid displaying auctions)   - buttons with dynamic ids e.g. id="view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}" (navigate to auction_details) - Context variables:   - auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]]   - categories: List[Dict[str, Any]]  ### 3. Auction Details Page - Template file: templates/auction_details.html - Page Title: Auction Details - IDs and Elements:   - div id="auction-details-page"   - h1 id="auction-title"   - div id="auction-description"   - div id="current-bid"   - button id="place-bid-button" (links to place_bid page)   - div id="bid-history" - Context variables:   - auction: Dict[str, Any]   - bid_history: List[Dict[str, Any]]   - highest_bid: float  ### 4. Place Bid Page - Template file: templates/place_bid.html - Page Title: Place Bid - IDs and Elements:   - div id="place-bid-page"   - input id="bidder-name" (text)   - input id="bid-amount" (number)   - div id="auction-name"   - div id="minimum-bid"   - button id="submit-bid-button" - Context variables:   - auction: Dict[str, Any]   - minimum_bid: float  ### 5. Bid History Page - Template file: templates/bid_history.html - Page Title: Bid History - IDs and Elements:   - div id="bid-history-page"   - table id="bids-table" (columns: bid ID, auction name, bidder, amount, timestamp)   - select id="filter-by-auction"   - button id="sort-by-amount"   - button id="back-to-dashboard" - Context variables:   - bids: List[Dict[str, Any]]   - selected_auction_id: Optional[int]  ### 6. Auction Categories Page - Template file: templates/categories.html - Page Title: Auction Categories - IDs and Elements:   - div id="categories-page"   - div id="categories-list"   - div id="category-card-{{ category.category_id }}" (for each category)   - button id="view-category-button-{{ category.category_id }}"   - button id="back-to-dashboard" - Context variables:   - categories: List[Dict[str, Any]]  ### 7. Winners Page - Template file: templates/winners.html - Page Title: Winning Items - IDs and Elements:   - div id="winners-page"   - div id="winners-list"   - div id="winner-card-{{ winner.auction_id }}" (for each winner)   - input id="filter-by-winner"   - button id="back-to-dashboard" - Context variables:   - winners: List[Dict[str, Any]]   - filter_name: Optional[str]  ### 8. Trending Auctions Page - Template file: templates/trending.html - Page Title: Trending Auctions - IDs and Elements:   - div id="trending-page"   - div id="trending-list"   - select id="time-range-filter"   - buttons with ids "view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}"   - button id="back-to-dashboard" - Context variables:   - trending_auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]]   - time_range: str  ### 9. Auction Status Page - Template file: templates/status.html - Page Title: Auction Status - IDs and Elements:   - div id="status-page"   - select id="status-filter"   - table id="status-table" (columns: auction name, status, time remaining, current bid)   - button id="refresh-status-button"   - button id="back-to-dashboard" - Context variables:   - auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]]   - status_filter: Optional[str]  ---  ## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)  All files are stored in `data/` directory and pipe-delimited (|) with no header line.  ### auctions.txt - **Fields:** auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | description (str) | category (str) | starting_bid (float) | current_bid (float) | end_time (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) | status (str) | image_url (str) - **Description:** Stores details of auction items. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|Vintage Leather Watch|Antique leather wristwatch from the 1950s|Collectibles|25.00|45.50|2025-02-15 18:00|Active|watch.jpg 2|iPhone 14 Pro|Latest Apple smartphone in excellent condition|Electronics|500.00|620.00|2025-02-10 12:00|Active|iphone.jpg 3|Wooden Desk|Beautiful oak wood desk with original finish|Furniture|75.00|110.00|2025-02-08 20:00|Closed|desk.jpg ```  ### categories.txt - **Fields:** category_id (int) | category_name (str) | description (str) | item_count (int) - **Description:** Stores auction categories and counts. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|Electronics|Digital devices and gadgets|15 2|Collectibles|Rare and valuable collector items|28 3|Furniture|Household furniture and decor|12 ```  ### bids.txt - **Fields:** bid_id (int) | auction_id (int) | bidder_name (str) | bid_amount (float) | bid_timestamp (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) - **Description:** Stores bids placed on auctions. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|1|Alice Johnson|45.50|2025-02-05 14:30 2|2|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45 3|3|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-04 10:15 ```  ### winners.txt - **Fields:** winner_id (int) | auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | winner_name (str) | winning_bid (float) | win_date (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD) - **Description:** Stores winners of auctions. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|3|Wooden Desk|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-08 2|5|Victorian Mirror|Diana Prince|95.00|2025-02-03 3|7|Vintage Books Set|Eve Stewart|150.00|2025-02-01 ```  ### bid_history.txt - **Fields:** history_id (int) | auction_id (int) | auction_name (str) | bidder_name (str) | bid_amount (float) | bid_timestamp (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) - **Description:** Historical record of bids. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Alice Johnson|40.00|2025-02-05 13:00 2|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Frank Miller|42.50|2025-02-05 13:45 3|2|iPhone 14 Pro|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45 ```  ### items.txt - **Fields:** item_id (int) | auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | starting_price (float) | category (str) | condition (str) | seller_name (str) - **Description:** Stores details about auction items including condition and seller information. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|25.00|Collectibles|Excellent|John Collector 2|2|iPhone 14 Pro|500.00|Electronics|Like New|Tech Store 3|3|Wooden Desk|75.00|Furniture|Good|Antique Shop ```  ### trending.txt - **Fields:** auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | bid_count (int) | current_bid (float) | trending_rank (int) | time_period (str) - **Description:** Stores auction trending data. - **Example rows:** ``` 2|iPhone 14 Pro|12|620.00|1|This Week 1|Vintage Leather Watch|8|45.50|2|This Week 5|Vintage Camera|6|85.00|3|This Week ```  ---  End of specification.

# OnlineAuction Web Application Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification (Backend)

| Route Path                          | Function Name         | HTTP Method(s) | Template to Render       | Context Variables (Type Annotations)                                                                                                  |
|-----------------------------------|-----------------------|----------------|-------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| /                                 | index                 | GET            | N/A (redirect to dashboard) | None                                                                                                                           |
| /dashboard                        | dashboard             | GET            | templates/dashboard.html | featured_auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str)             |
| /auction/catalog                  | auction_catalog       | GET            | templates/catalog.html   | auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str), 
                                                                               categories: List[Dict[str, Any]] (category_id: int, category_name: str)                                                            |
| /auction/<int:auction_id>         | auction_details       | GET            | templates/auction_details.html | auction: Dict[str, Any] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, description: str, category: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, status: str, image_url: str),
                                                                       bid_history: List[Dict[str, Any]] (bid_id: int, bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float, bid_timestamp: str),
                                                                       highest_bid: float                                                      |
| /auction/<int:auction_id>/place_bid | place_bid          | GET, POST      | templates/place_bid.html  | auction: Dict[str, Any] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float), minimum_bid: float
 POST form data: bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float                                                             |
| /bid/history                     | bid_history           | GET            | templates/bid_history.html | bids: List[Dict[str, Any]] (bid_id: int, auction_id: int, auction_name: str, bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float, bid_timestamp: str), 
                                               selected_auction_id: int or None                                                                                          |
| /categories                     | categories            | GET            | templates/categories.html| categories: List[Dict[str, Any]] (category_id: int, category_name: str, description: str, item_count: int)                             |
| /winners                       | winners               | GET            | templates/winners.html   | winners: List[Dict[str, Any]] (winner_id: int, auction_id: int, item_name: str, winner_name: str, winning_bid: float, win_date: str),
                                   filter_name: str (optional)                                                                                   |
| /trending                      | trending_auctions     | GET            | templates/trending.html  | trending_auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, bid_count: int, current_bid: float, trending_rank: int, time_period: str),
                                               time_range: str                                                                                      |
| /status                        | status                | GET            | templates/status.html    | auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, status: str, end_time: str, current_bid: float),
                                               status_filter: str (optional)                                                                    |

---

## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification (Frontend)

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Template file: templates/dashboard.html
- Page Title: Auction Dashboard
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="dashboard-page"
  - div id="featured-auctions"
  - button id="browse-auctions-button" (navigates to auction_catalog function)
  - button id="view-bids-button" (navigates to bid_history function)
  - button id="trending-auctions-button" (navigates to trending_auctions function)
- Context variables:
  - featured_auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str)

### 2. Auction Catalog Page
- Template file: templates/catalog.html
- Page Title: Auction Catalog
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="catalog-page"
  - input id="search-input" (text input for search)
  - select id="category-filter" (dropdown for category filter)
  - div id="auctions-grid" (grid displaying auctions)
  - buttons with dynamic ids e.g. id="view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}" (navigate to auction_details)
- Context variables:
  - auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]]
  - categories: List[Dict[str, Any]]

### 3. Auction Details Page
- Template file: templates/auction_details.html
- Page Title: Auction Details
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="auction-details-page"
  - h1 id="auction-title"
  - div id="auction-description"
  - div id="current-bid"
  - button id="place-bid-button" (links to place_bid page)
  - div id="bid-history"
- Context variables:
  - auction: Dict[str, Any]
  - bid_history: List[Dict[str, Any]]
  - highest_bid: float

### 4. Place Bid Page
- Template file: templates/place_bid.html
- Page Title: Place Bid
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="place-bid-page"
  - input id="bidder-name" (text)
  - input id="bid-amount" (number)
  - div id="auction-name"
  - div id="minimum-bid"
  - button id="submit-bid-button"
- Context variables:
  - auction: Dict[str, Any]
  - minimum_bid: float

### 5. Bid History Page
- Template file: templates/bid_history.html
- Page Title: Bid History
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="bid-history-page"
  - table id="bids-table" (columns: bid ID, auction name, bidder, amount, timestamp)
  - select id="filter-by-auction"
  - button id="sort-by-amount"
  - button id="back-to-dashboard"
- Context variables:
  - bids: List[Dict[str, Any]]
  - selected_auction_id: Optional[int]

### 6. Auction Categories Page
- Template file: templates/categories.html
- Page Title: Auction Categories
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="categories-page"
  - div id="categories-list"
  - div id="category-card-{{ category.category_id }}" (for each category)
  - button id="view-category-button-{{ category.category_id }}"
  - button id="back-to-dashboard"
- Context variables:
  - categories: List[Dict[str, Any]]

### 7. Winners Page
- Template file: templates/winners.html
- Page Title: Winning Items
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="winners-page"
  - div id="winners-list"
  - div id="winner-card-{{ winner.auction_id }}" (for each winner)
  - input id="filter-by-winner"
  - button id="back-to-dashboard"
- Context variables:
  - winners: List[Dict[str, Any]]
  - filter_name: Optional[str]

### 8. Trending Auctions Page
- Template file: templates/trending.html
- Page Title: Trending Auctions
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="trending-page"
  - div id="trending-list"
  - select id="time-range-filter"
  - buttons with ids "view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}"
  - button id="back-to-dashboard"
- Context variables:
  - trending_auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]]
  - time_range: str

### 9. Auction Status Page
- Template file: templates/status.html
- Page Title: Auction Status
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="status-page"
  - select id="status-filter"
  - table id="status-table" (columns: auction name, status, time remaining, current bid)
  - button id="refresh-status-button"
  - button id="back-to-dashboard"
- Context variables:
  - auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]]
  - status_filter: Optional[str]

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)

All files are stored in `data/` directory and pipe-delimited (|) with no header line.

### auctions.txt
- **Fields:** auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | description (str) | category (str) | starting_bid (float) | current_bid (float) | end_time (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) | status (str) | image_url (str)
- **Description:** Stores details of auction items.
- **Example rows:**
```
1|Vintage Leather Watch|Antique leather wristwatch from the 1950s|Collectibles|25.00|45.50|2025-02-15 18:00|Active|watch.jpg
2|iPhone 14 Pro|Latest Apple smartphone in excellent condition|Electronics|500.00|620.00|2025-02-10 12:00|Active|iphone.jpg
3|Wooden Desk|Beautiful oak wood desk with original finish|Furniture|75.00|110.00|2025-02-08 20:00|Closed|desk.jpg
```

### categories.txt
- **Fields:** category_id (int) | category_name (str) | description (str) | item_count (int)
- **Description:** Stores auction categories and counts.
- **Example rows:**
```
1|Electronics|Digital devices and gadgets|15
2|Collectibles|Rare and valuable collector items|28
3|Furniture|Household furniture and decor|12
```

### bids.txt
- **Fields:** bid_id (int) | auction_id (int) | bidder_name (str) | bid_amount (float) | bid_timestamp (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- **Description:** Stores bids placed on auctions.
- **Example rows:**
```
1|1|Alice Johnson|45.50|2025-02-05 14:30
2|2|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45
3|3|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-04 10:15
```

### winners.txt
- **Fields:** winner_id (int) | auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | winner_name (str) | winning_bid (float) | win_date (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD)
- **Description:** Stores winners of auctions.
- **Example rows:**
```
1|3|Wooden Desk|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-08
2|5|Victorian Mirror|Diana Prince|95.00|2025-02-03
3|7|Vintage Books Set|Eve Stewart|150.00|2025-02-01
```

### bid_history.txt
- **Fields:** history_id (int) | auction_id (int) | auction_name (str) | bidder_name (str) | bid_amount (float) | bid_timestamp (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- **Description:** Historical record of bids.
- **Example rows:**
```
1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Alice Johnson|40.00|2025-02-05 13:00
2|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Frank Miller|42.50|2025-02-05 13:45
3|2|iPhone 14 Pro|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45
```

### items.txt
- **Fields:** item_id (int) | auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | starting_price (float) | category (str) | condition (str) | seller_name (str)
- **Description:** Stores details about auction items including condition and seller information.
- **Example rows:**
```
1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|25.00|Collectibles|Excellent|John Collector
2|2|iPhone 14 Pro|500.00|Electronics|Like New|Tech Store
3|3|Wooden Desk|75.00|Furniture|Good|Antique Shop
```

### trending.txt
- **Fields:** auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | bid_count (int) | current_bid (float) | trending_rank (int) | time_period (str)
- **Description:** Stores auction trending data.
- **Example rows:**
```
2|iPhone 14 Pro|12|620.00|1|This Week
1|Vintage Leather Watch|8|45.50|2|This Week
5|Vintage Camera|6|85.00|3|This Week
```

---

End of specification.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Auction Details</title>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="auction-details-page">
        <h1 id="auction-title">{{ auction.item_name }}</h1>

        <div id="auction-description">
            {{ auction.description }}
        </div>

        <div id="current-bid">
            Current Bid: ${{ '%.2f'|format(auction.current_bid) }}
        </div>

        <a href="{{ url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction.auction_id) }}">
            <button id="place-bid-button">Place Bid</button>
        </a>

        <div id="bid-history">
            <h2>Bid History</h2>
            <ul>
                {% for bid in bid_history %}
                <li id="bid-{{ bid.bid_id }}">{{ bid.bidder_name }} bid ${{ '%.2f'|format(bid.bid_amount) }} at {{ bid.bid_timestamp }}</li>
                {% endfor %}
            </ul>
        </div>
    </div>
</body>
</html>


=== /home/jun/0624/CaMP/results/Software-web-rebuttal/compound_timeout_300/OnlineAuction/compound_chaos/templates/bid_history.html ===
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Bid History</title>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="bid-history-page">
        <h1>Bid History</h1>

        <select id="filter-by-auction" name="auction-filter">
            <option value="">All Auctions</option>
            {% set seen_auctions = [] %}
            {% for bid in bids %}
                {% if bid.auction_id not in seen_auctions %}
                    <option value="{{ bid.auction_id }}" {% if selected_auction_id == bid.auction_id %}selected{% endif %}>{{ bid.auction_name }}</option>
                    {% do seen_auctions.append(bid.auction_id) %}
                {% endif %}
            {% endfor %}
        </select>

        <button id="sort-by-amount">Sort by Amount</button>

        <table id="bids-table" border="1">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>Bid ID</th>
                    <th>Auction Name</th>
                    <th>Bidder</th>
                    <th>Amount</th>
                    <th>Timestamp</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for bid in bids %}
                {% if selected_auction_id == None or selected_auction_id == bid.auction_id %}
                <tr id="bid-{{ bid.bid_id }}">
                    <td>{{ bid.bid_id }}</td>
                    <td>{{ bid.auction_name }}</td>
                    <td>{{ bid.bidder_name }}</td>
                    <td>${{ '%.2f'|format(bid.bid_amount) }}</td>
                    <td>{{ bid.bid_timestamp }}</td>
                </tr>
                {% endif %}
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>

        <a href="{{ url_for('dashboard') }}"><button id="back-to-dashboard">Back to Dashboard</button></a>
    </div>
</body>
</html>

'bid_amount': float(parts[3]),\n                'bid_timestamp': parts[4]\n            }\n            bids.append(bid)\n    return bids\n\n\ndef save_bids(bids: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> None:\n    filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'bids.txt')\n    with open(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        for b in bids:\n            line = f\"{b['bid_id']}|{b['auction_id']}|{b['bidder_name']}|{b['bid_amount']:.2f}|{b['bid_timestamp']}\\n\"\n            f.write(line)\n\n\ndef load_winners() -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:\n    winners = []\n    filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'winners.txt')\n    if not os.path.exists(filepath):\n        return winners\n    with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        for line in f:\n            parts = line.strip().split('|')\n            if len(parts) != 6:\n                continue\n            winner = {\n                'winner_id': int(parts[0]),\n                'auction_id': int(parts[1]),\n                'item_name': parts[2],\n                'winner_name': parts[3],\n                'winning_bid': float(parts[4]),\n                'win_date': parts[5]\n            }\n            winners.append(winner)\n    return winners\n\n\ndef load_bid_history() -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:\n    bid_history = []\n    filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'bid_history.txt')\n    if not os.path.exists(filepath):\n        return bid_history\n    with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        for line in f:\n            parts = line.strip().split('|')\n            if len(parts) != 6:\n                continue\n            history = {\n                'history_id': int(parts[0]),\n                'auction_id': int(parts[1]),\n                'auction_name': parts[2],\n                'bidder_name': parts[3],\n                'bid_amount': float(parts[4]),\n                'bid_timestamp': parts[5]\n            }\n            bid_history.append(history)\n    return bid_history\n\n\ndef load_trending() -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:\n    trending = []\n    filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'trending.txt')\n    if not os.path.exists(filepath):\n        return trending\n    with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        for line in f:\n            parts = line.strip().split('|')\n            if len(parts) != 6:\n                continue\n            entry = {\n                'auction_id': int(parts[0]),\n                'item_name': parts[1],\n                'bid_count': int(parts[2]),\n                'current_bid': float(parts[3]),\n                'trending_rank': int(parts[4]),\n                'time_period': parts[5]\n            }\n            trending.append(entry)\n    return trending\n\n\n# Routes\n\n@app.route('/')\ndef index():\n    return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))\n\n\n@app.route('/dashboard')\ndef dashboard():\n    auctions = load_auctions()\n    # Prepare featured_auctions list\n    # Let's assume featured auctions are those with status active and soonest end time, or limit to 5\n    # Sort active auctions by end_time ascending\n    active_auctions = [a for a in auctions if a['status'] == 'Active']\n    active_auctions.sort(key=lambda x: x['end_time'])\n    featured_auctions = []\n    for a in active_auctions[:5]:\n        featured_auctions.append({\n            'auction_id': a['auction_id'],\n            'item_name': a['item_name'],\n            'current_bid': a['current_bid'],\n            'end_time': a['end_time'],\n            'image_url': a['image_url']\n        })\n    return render_template('dashboard.html', featured_auctions=featured_auctions)\n\n\n@app.route('/auction/catalog')\ndef auction_catalog():\n    auctions_all = load_auctions()\n    categories = load_categories()\n    auctions = []\n    for a in auctions_all:\n        auctions.append({\n            'auction_id': a['auction_id'],\n            'item_name': a['item_name'],\n            'current_bid': a['current_bid'],\n            'end_time': a['end_time'],\n            'image_url': a['image_url']\n        })\n    return render_template('catalog.html', auctions=auctions, categories=categories)\n\n\n@app.route('/auction/<int:auction_id>')\ndef auction_details(auction_id: int):\n    auctions = load_auctions()\n    bids = load_bids()\n    auction = None\n    for a in auctions:\n        if a['auction_id'] == auction_id:\n            auction = a\n            break\n    if not auction:\n        # Auction not found\n        return render_template('auction_details.html', auction=None, bid_history=[], highest_bid=0.0)\n\n    # Extract bid_history for this auction from bids\n    bid_history = []\n    highest_bid = auction['current_bid']\n    for b in bids:\n        if b['auction_id'] == auction_id:\n            bid_history.append({\n                'bid_id': b['bid_id'],\n                'bidder_name': b['bidder_name'],\n                'bid_amount': b['bid_amount'],\n                'bid_timestamp': b['bid_timestamp']\n            })\n            if b['bid_amount'] > highest_bid:\n                highest_bid = b['bid_amount']\n\n    # Sort bid_history by bid_timestamp ascending (oldest first)\n    bid_history.sort(key=lambda x: x['bid_timestamp'])\n\n    return render_template('auction_details.html', auction=auction, bid_history=bid_history, highest_bid=highest_bid)\n\n\nfrom datetime import datetime\n\n@app.route('/auction/<int:auction_id>/place_bid', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef place_bid(auction_id: int):\n    auctions = load_auctions()\n    bids = load_bids()\n    auction = None\n    for a in auctions:\n        if a['auction_id'] == auction_id:\n            auction = a\n            break\n    if not auction:\n        # Auction not found\n        return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=None, minimum_bid=0.0)\n\n    minimum_bid = max(auction['current_bid'], auction['starting_bid']) + 0.01\n\n    if request.method == 'POST':\n        bidder_name = request.form.get('bidder_name', '').strip()\n        bid_amount_raw = request.form.get('bid_amount', '')\n        try:\n            bid_amount = float(bid_amount_raw)\n        except ValueError:\n            bid_amount = 0.0\n\n        if not bidder_name or bid_amount < minimum_bid:\n            # Invalid bid, re-render with minimum_bid info and auction\n            return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=auction, minimum_bid=minimum_bid)\n\n        # Add new bid\n        new_bid_id = 1\n        if bids:\n            new_bid_id = max(b['bid_id'] for b in bids) + 1\n\n        # Compose bid timestamp as current time in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM\n        bid_timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')\n\n        new_bid = {\n            'bid_id': new_bid_id,\n            'auction_id': auction_id,\n            'bidder_name': bidder_name,\n            'bid_amount': bid_amount,\n            'bid_timestamp': bid_timestamp\n        }\n\n        # Append to bids\n        bids.append(new_bid)\n        save_bids(bids)\n\n        # Update auction current_bid if bid_amount is higher\n        if bid_amount > auction['current_bid']:\n            auction['current_bid'] = bid_amount\n            # Save auctions\n            save_auctions(auctions)\n\n        # Redirect to auction details page\n        return redirect(url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction_id))\n\n    return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=auction, minimum_bid=minimum_bid)\n\n\n@app.route('/bid/history')\ndef bid_history():\n    bids = load_bids()\n    auctions = load_auctions()\n\n    # Collect auction id to item_name mapping\n    auction_name_map = {a['auction_id']: a['item_name'] for a in auctions}\n\n    # Get selected auction_id from query parameter or None\n    selected_auction_id = request.args.get('auction_id', default=None, type=int)\n\n    filtered_bids = []\n    for b in bids:\n        if selected_auction_id is None or b['auction_id'] == selected_auction_id:\n            filtered_bids.append({\n                'bid_id': b['bid_id'],\n                'auction_id': b['auction_id'],\n                'auction_name': auction_name_map.get(b['auction_id'], 'Unknown'),\n                'bidder_name': b['bidder_name'],\n                'bid_amount': b['bid_amount'],\n                'bid_timestamp': b['bid_timestamp']\n            })\n\n    # Sort bids by bid_timestamp descending (latest first)\n    filtered_bids.sort(key=lambda x: x['bid_timestamp'], reverse=True)\n\n    return render_template('bid_history.html', bids=filtered_bids, selected_auction_id=selected_auction_id)\n\n\n@app.route('/categories')\ndef categories():\n    categories = load_categories()\n    return render_template('categories.html', categories=categories)\n\n\n@app.route('/winners')\ndef winners():\n    winners = load_winners()\n    filter_name = request.args.get('filter_name', default=None, type=str)\n    if filter_name:\n        filter_name_lower = filter_name.lower()\n        winners = [w for w in winners if filter_name_lower in w['winner_name'].lower()]\n    return render_template('winners.html', winners=winners, filter_name=filter_name)\n\n\n@app.route('/trending')\ndef trending_auctions():\n    trending = load_trending()\n    # time_range from query string or default \"This Week\"\n    time_range = request.args.get('time_range', 'This Week')\n    trending_auctions = [t for t in trending if t['time_period'] == time_range]\n\n    # Sort by trending_rank ascending\n    trending_auctions.sort(key=lambda x: x['trending_rank'])\n\n    return render_template('trending.html', trending_auctions=trending_auctions, time_range=time_range)\n\n\n@app.route('/status')\ndef status():\n    auctions = load_auctions()\n    status_filter = request.args.get('status_filter', default=None, type=str)\n    filtered_auctions = []\n    for a in auctions:\n        if status_filter is None or a['status'].lower() == status_filter.lower():\n            filtered_auctions.append({\n                'auction_id': a['auction_id'],\n                'item_name': a['item_name'],\n                'status': a['status'],\n                'end_time': a['end_time'],\n                'current_bid': a['current_bid']\n            })\n    return render_template('status.html', auctions=filtered_auctions, status_filter=status_filter)\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    app.run(debug=True, port=5000)\n"})

Bid History Page - Template file: templates/bid_history.html - Page Title: Bid History - IDs and Elements:   - div id="bid-history-page"   - table id="bids-table" (columns: bid ID, auction name, bidder, amount, timestamp)   - select id="filter-by-auction"   - button id="sort-by-amount"   - button id="back-to-dashboard" - Context variables:   - bids: List[Dict[str, Any]]   - selected_auction_id: Optional[int]  ### 6. Auction Categories Page - Template file: templates/categories.html - Page Title: Auction Categories - IDs and Elements:   - div id="categories-page"   - div id="categories-list"   - div id="category-card-{{ category.category_id }}" (for each category)   - button id="view-category-button-{{ category.category_id }}"   - button id="back-to-dashboard" - Context variables:   - categories: List[Dict[str, Any]]  ### 7. Winners Page - Template file: templates/winners.html - Page Title: Winning Items - IDs and Elements:   - div id="winners-page"   - div id="winners-list"   - div id="winner-card-{{ winner.auction_id }}" (for each winner)   - input id="filter-by-winner"   - button id="back-to-dashboard" - Context variables:   - winners: List[Dict[str, Any]]   - filter_name: Optional[str]  ### 8. Trending Auctions Page - Template file: templates/trending.html - Page Title: Trending Auctions - IDs and Elements:   - div id="trending-page"   - div id="trending-list"   - select id="time-range-filter"   - buttons with ids "view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}"   - button id="back-to-dashboard" - Context variables:   - trending_auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]]   - time_range: str  ### 9. Auction Status Page - Template file: templates/status.html - Page Title: Auction Status - IDs and Elements:   - div id="status-page"   - select id="status-filter"   - table id="status-table" (columns: auction name, status, time remaining, current bid)   - button id="refresh-status-button"   - button id="back-to-dashboard" - Context variables:   - auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]]   - status_filter: Optional[str]  ---  ## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)  All files are stored in `data/` directory and pipe-delimited (|) with no header line.  ### auctions.txt - **Fields:** auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | description (str) | category (str) | starting_bid (float) | current_bid (float) | end_time (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) | status (str) | image_url (str) - **Description:** Stores details of auction items. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|Vintage Leather Watch|Antique leather wristwatch from the 1950s|Collectibles|25.00|45.50|2025-02-15 18:00|Active|watch.jpg 2|iPhone 14 Pro|Latest Apple smartphone in excellent condition|Electronics|500.00|620.00|2025-02-10 12:00|Active|iphone.jpg 3|Wooden Desk|Beautiful oak wood desk with original finish|Furniture|75.00|110.00|2025-02-08 20:00|Closed|desk.jpg ```  ### categories.txt - **Fields:** category_id (int) | category_name (str) | description (str) | item_count (int) - **Description:** Stores auction categories and counts. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|Electronics|Digital devices and gadgets|15 2|Collectibles|Rare and valuable collector items|28 3|Furniture|Household furniture and decor|12 ```  ### bids.txt - **Fields:** bid_id (int) | auction_id (int) | bidder_name (str) | bid_amount (float) | bid_timestamp (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) - **Description:** Stores bids placed on auctions. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|1|Alice Johnson|45.50|2025-02-05 14:30 2|2|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45 3|3|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-04 10:15 ```  ### winners.txt - **Fields:** winner_id (int) | auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | winner_name (str) | winning_bid (float) | win_date (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD) - **Description:** Stores winners of auctions. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|3|Wooden Desk|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-08 2|5|Victorian Mirror|Diana Prince|95.00|2025-02-03 3|7|Vintage Books Set|Eve Stewart|150.00|2025-02-01 ```  ### bid_history.txt - **Fields:** history_id (int) | auction_id (int) | auction_name (str) | bidder_name (str) | bid_amount (float) | bid_timestamp (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) - **Description:** Historical record of bids. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Alice Johnson|40.00|2025-02-05 13:00 2|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Frank Miller|42.50|2025-02-05 13:45 3|2|iPhone 14 Pro|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45 ```  ### items.txt - **Fields:** item_id (int) | auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | starting_price (float) | category (str) | condition (str) | seller_name (str) - **Description:** Stores details about auction items including condition and seller information. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|25.00|Collectibles|Excellent|John Collector 2|2|iPhone 14 Pro|500.00|Electronics|Like New|Tech Store 3|3|Wooden Desk|75.00|Furniture|Good|Antique Shop ```  ### trending.txt - **Fields:** auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | bid_count (int) | current_bid (float) | trending_rank (int) | time_period (str) - **Description:** Stores auction trending data. - **Example rows:** ``` 2|iPhone 14 Pro|12|620.00|1|This Week 1|Vintage Leather Watch|8|45.50|2|This Week 5|Vintage Camera|6|85.00|3|This Week ```  ---  End of specification.
  [app.py] from flask import Flask, render_template, redirect, url_for, request import os from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional  app = Flask(__name__) app.config['SECRET_KEY'] = 'dev-secret-key'  data_dir = 'data'  # Helper functions to load and save data from pipe-delimited files  def load_auctions() -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:     auctions = []     filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'auctions.txt')     if not os.path.exists(filepath):         return auctions     with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for line in f:             parts = line.strip().split('|')             if len(parts) != 9:                 continue             auction = {                 'auction_id': int(parts[0]),                 'item_name': parts[1],                 'description': parts[2],                 'category': parts[3],                 'starting_bid': float(parts[4]),                 'current_bid': float(parts[5]),                 'end_time': parts[6],                 'status': parts[7],                 'image_url': parts[8]             }             auctions.append(auction)     return auctions   def save_auctions(auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> None:     filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'auctions.txt')     with open(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for a in auctions:             line = f"{a['auction_id']}|{a['item_name']}|{a['description']}|{a['category']}|{a['starting_bid']:.2f}|{a['current_bid']:.2f}|{a['end_time']}|{a['status']}|{a['image_url']}\n"             f.write(line)   def load_categories() -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:     categories = []     filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'categories.txt')     if not os.path.exists(filepath):         return categories     with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for line in f:             parts = line.strip().split('|')             if len(parts) != 4:                 continue             category = {                 'category_id': int(parts[0]),                 'category_name': parts[1],                 'description': parts[2],                 'item_count': int(parts[3])             }             categories.append(category)     return categories   def load_bids() -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:     bids = []     filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'bids.txt')     if not os.path.exists(filepath):         return bids     with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for line in f:             parts = line.strip().split('|')             if len(parts) != 5:                 continue             bid = {                 'bid_id': int(parts[0]),                 'auction_id': int(parts[1]),                 'bidder_name': parts[2],                 'bid_amount': float(parts[3]),                 'bid_timestamp': parts[4]             }             bids.append(bid)     return bids   def save_bids(bids: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> None:     filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'bids.txt')     with open(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for b in bids:             line = f"{b['bid_id']}|{b['auction_id']}|{b['bidder_name']}|{b['bid_amount']:.2f}|{b['bid_timestamp']}\n"             f.write(line)   def load_winners() -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:     winners = []     filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'winners.txt')     if not os.path.exists(filepath):         return winners     with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for line in f:             parts = line.strip().split('|')             if len(parts) != 6:                 continue             winner = {                 'winner_id': int(parts[0]),                 'auction_id': int(parts[1]),                 'item_name': parts[2],                 'winner_name': parts[3],                 'winning_bid': float(parts[4]),                 'win_date': parts[5]             }             winners.append(winner)     return winners   def load_bid_history() -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:     bid_history = []     filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'bid_history.txt')     if not os.path.exists(filepath):         return bid_history     with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for line in f:             parts = line.strip().split('|')             if len(parts) != 6:                 continue             history = {                 'history_id': int(parts[0]),                 'auction_id': int(parts[1]),                 'auction_name': parts[2],                 'bidder_name': parts[3],                 'bid_amount': float(parts[4]),                 'bid_timestamp': parts[5]             }             bid_history.append(history)     return bid_history   def load_trending() -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:     trending = []     filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'trending.txt')     if not os.path.exists(filepath):         return trending     with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for line in f:             parts = line.strip().split('|')             if len(parts) != 6:                 continue             entry = {                 'auction_id': int(parts[0]),                 'item_name': parts[1],                 'bid_count': int(parts[2]),                 'current_bid': float(parts[3]),                 'trending_rank': int(parts[4]),                 'time_period': parts[5]             }             trending.append(entry)     return trending   # Routes  @app.route('/') def index():     return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))   @app.route('/dashboard') def dashboard():     auctions = load_auctions()     # Prepare featured_auctions list     # Let's assume featured auctions are those with status active and soonest end time, or limit to 5     # Sort active auctions by end_time ascending     active_auctions = [a for a in auctions if a['status'] == 'Active']     active_auctions.sort(key=lambda x: x['end_time'])     featured_auctions = []     for a in active_auctions[:5]:         featured_auctions.append({             'auction_id': a['auction_id'],             'item_name': a['item_name'],             'current_bid': a['current_bid'],             'end_time': a['end_time'],             'image_url': a['image_url']         })     return render_template('dashboard.html', featured_auctions=featured_auctions)   @app.route('/auction/catalog') def auction_catalog():     auctions_all = load_auctions()     categories = load_categories()     auctions = []     for a in auctions_all:         auctions.append({             'auction_id': a['auction_id'],             'item_name': a['item_name'],             'current_bid': a['current_bid'],             'end_time': a['end_time'],             'image_url': a['image_url']         })     return render_template('catalog.html', auctions=auctions, categories=categories)   @app.route('/auction/<int:auction_id>') def auction_details(auction_id: int):     auctions = load_auctions()     bids = load_bids()     auction = None     for a in auctions:         if a['auction_id'] == auction_id:             auction = a             break     if not auction:         # Auction not found         return render_template('auction_details.html', auction=None, bid_history=[], highest_bid=0.0)      # Extract bid_history for this auction from bids     bid_history = []     highest_bid = auction['current_bid']     for b in bids:         if b['auction_id'] == auction_id:             bid_history.append({                 'bid_id': b['bid_id'],                 'bidder_name': b['bidder_name'],                 'bid_amount': b['bid_amount'],                 'bid_timestamp': b['bid_timestamp']             })             if b['bid_amount'] > highest_bid:                 highest_bid = b['bid_amount']      # Sort bid_history by bid_timestamp ascending (oldest first)     bid_history.sort(key=lambda x: x['bid_timestamp'])      return render_template('auction_details.html', auction=auction, bid_history=bid_history, highest_bid=highest_bid)   from datetime import datetime  @app.route('/auction/<int:auction_id>/place_bid', methods=['GET', 'POST']) def place_bid(auction_id: int):     auctions = load_auctions()     bids = load_bids()     auction = None     for a in auctions:         if a['auction_id'] == auction_id:             auction = a             break     if not auction:         # Auction not found         return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=None, minimum_bid=0.0)      minimum_bid = max(auction['current_bid'], auction['starting_bid']) + 0.01      if request.method == 'POST':         bidder_name = request.form.get('bidder_name', '').strip()         bid_amount_raw = request.form.get('bid_amount', '')         try:             bid_amount = float(bid_amount_raw)         except ValueError:             bid_amount = 0.0          if not bidder_name or bid_amount < minimum_bid:             # Invalid bid, re-render with minimum_bid info and auction             return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=auction, minimum_bid=minimum_bid)          # Add new bid         new_bid_id = 1         if bids:             new_bid_id = max(b['bid_id'] for b in bids) + 1          # Compose bid timestamp as current time in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM         bid_timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')          new_bid = {             'bid_id': new_bid_id,             'auction_id': auction_id,             'bidder_name': bidder_name,             'bid_amount': bid_amount,             'bid_timestamp': bid_timestamp         }          # Append to bids         bids.append(new_bid)         save_bids(bids)          # Update auction current_bid if bid_amount is higher         if bid_amount > auction['current_bid']:             auction['current_bid'] = bid_amount             # Save auctions             save_auctions(auctions)          # Redirect to auction details page         return redirect(url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction_id))      return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=auction, minimum_bid=minimum_bid)   @app.route('/bid/history') def bid_history():     bids = load_bids()     auctions = load_auctions()      # Collect auction id to item_name mapping     auction_name_map = {a['auction_id']: a['item_name'] for a in auctions}      # Get selected auction_id from query parameter or None     selected_auction_id = request.args.get('auction_id', default=None, type=int)      filtered_bids = []     for b in bids:         if selected_auction_id is None or b['auction_id'] == selected_auction_id:             filtered_bids.append({                 'bid_id': b['bid_id'],                 'auction_id': b['auction_id'],                 'auction_name': auction_name_map.get(b['auction_id'], 'Unknown'),                 'bidder_name': b['bidder_name'],                 'bid_amount': b['bid_amount'],                 'bid_timestamp': b['bid_timestamp']             })      # Sort bids by bid_timestamp descending (latest first)     filtered_bids.sort(key=lambda x: x['bid_timestamp'], reverse=True)      return render_template('bid_history.html', bids=filtered_bids, selected_auction_id=selected_auction_id)   @app.route('/categories') def categories():     categories = load_categories()     return render_template('categories.html', categories=categories)   @app.route('/winners') def winners():     winners = load_winners()     filter_name = request.args.get('filter_name', default=None, type=str)     if filter_name:         filter_name_lower = filter_name.lower()         winners = [w for w in winners if filter_name_lower in w['winner_name'].lower()]     return render_template('winners.html', winners=winners, filter_name=filter_name)   @app.route('/trending') def trending_auctions():     trending = load_trending()     # time_range from query string or default "This Week"     time_range = request.args.get('time_range', 'This Week')     trending_auctions = [t for t in trending if t['time_period'] == time_range]      # Sort by trending_rank ascending     trending_auctions.sort(key=lambda x: x['trending_rank'])      return render_template('trending.html', trending_auctions=trending_auctions, time_range=time_range)   @app.route('/status') def status():     auctions = load_auctions()     status_filter = request.args.get('status_filter', default=None, type=str)     filtered_auctions = []     for a in auctions:         if status_filter is None or a['status'].lower() == status_filter.lower():             filtered_auctions.append({                 'auction_id': a['auction_id'],                 'item_name': a['item_name'],                 'status': a['status'],                 'end_time': a['end_time'],                 'current_bid': a['current_bid']             })     return render_template('status.html', auctions=filtered_auctions, status_filter=status_filter)   if __name__ == '__main__':     app.run(debug=True, port=5000)

# OnlineAuction Web Application Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification (Backend)

| Route Path                          | Function Name         | HTTP Method(s) | Template to Render       | Context Variables (Type Annotations)                                                                                                  |
|-----------------------------------|-----------------------|----------------|-------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| /                                 | index                 | GET            | N/A (redirect to dashboard) | None                                                                                                                           |
| /dashboard                        | dashboard             | GET            | templates/dashboard.html | featured_auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str)             |
| /auction/catalog                  | auction_catalog       | GET            | templates/catalog.html   | auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str), 
                                                                               categories: List[Dict[str, Any]] (category_id: int, category_name: str)                                                            |
| /auction/<int:auction_id>         | auction_details       | GET            | templates/auction_details.html | auction: Dict[str, Any] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, description: str, category: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, status: str, image_url: str),
                                                                       bid_history: List[Dict[str, Any]] (bid_id: int, bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float, bid_timestamp: str),
                                                                       highest_bid: float                                                      |
| /auction/<int:auction_id>/place_bid | place_bid          | GET, POST      | templates/place_bid.html  | auction: Dict[str, Any] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float), minimum_bid: float
 POST form data: bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float                                                             |
| /bid/history                     | bid_history           | GET            | templates/bid_history.html | bids: List[Dict[str, Any]] (bid_id: int, auction_id: int, auction_name: str, bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float, bid_timestamp: str), 
                                               selected_auction_id: int or None                                                                                          |
| /categories                     | categories            | GET            | templates/categories.html| categories: List[Dict[str, Any]] (category_id: int, category_name: str, description: str, item_count: int)                             |
| /winners                       | winners               | GET            | templates/winners.html   | winners: List[Dict[str, Any]] (winner_id: int, auction_id: int, item_name: str, winner_name: str, winning_bid: float, win_date: str),
                                   filter_name: str (optional)                                                                                   |
| /trending                      | trending_auctions     | GET            | templates/trending.html  | trending_auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, bid_count: int, current_bid: float, trending_rank: int, time_period: str),
                                               time_range: str                                                                                      |
| /status                        | status                | GET            | templates/status.html    | auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, status: str, end_time: str, current_bid: float),
                                               status_filter: str (optional)                                                                    |

## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification (Frontend)

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Template file: templates/dashboard.html
- Page Title: Auction Dashboard
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="dashboard-page"
  - div id="featured-auctions"
  - button id="browse-auctions-button" (navigates to auction_catalog function)
  - button id="view-bids-button" (navigates to bid_history function)
  - button id="trending-auctions-button" (navigates to trending_auctions function)
- Context variables:
  - featured_auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str)

### 2. Auction Catalog Page
- Template file: templates/catalog.html
- Page Title: Auction Catalog
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="catalog-page"
  - input id="search-input" (text input for search)
  - select id="category-filter" (dropdown for category filter)
  - div id="auctions-grid" (grid displaying auctions)
  - buttons with dynamic ids e.g. id="view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}" (navigate to auction_details)
- Context variables:
  - auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]]
  - categories: List[Dict[str, Any]]

### 3. Auction Details Page
- Template file: templates/auction_details.html
- Page Title: Auction Details
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="auction-details-page"
  - h1 id="auction-title"
  - div id="auction-description"
  - div id="current-bid"
  - button id="place-bid-button" (links to place_bid page)
  - div id="bid-history"
- Context variables:
  - auction: Dict[str, Any]
  - bid_history: List[Dict[str, Any]]
  - highest_bid: float

### 4. Place Bid Page
- Template file: templates/place_bid.html
- Page Title: Place Bid
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="place-bid-page"
  - input id="bidder-name" (text)
  - input id="bid-amount" (number)
  - div id="auction-name"
  - div id="minimum-bid"
  - button id="submit-bid-button"
- Context variables:
  - auction: Dict[str, Any]
  - minimum_bid: float

### 5. Bid History Page
- Template file: templates/bid_history.html
- Page Title: Bid History
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="bid-history-page"
  - table id="bids-table" (columns: bid ID, auction name, bidder, amount, timestamp)
  - select id="filter-by-auction"
  - button id="sort-by-amount"
  - button id="back-to-dashboard"
- Context variables:
  - bids: List[Dict[str, Any]]
  - selected_auction_id: Optional[int]

### 6. Auction Categories Page
- Template file: templates/categories.html
- Page Title: Auction Categories
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="categories-page"
  - div id="categories-list"
  - div id="category-card-{{ category.category_id }}" (for each category)
  - button id="view-category-button-{{ category.category_id }}"
  - button id="back-to-dashboard"
- Context variables:
  - categories: List[Dict[str, Any]]

- Page Title: Winning Items
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="winners-page"
  - div id="winners-list"
  - div id="winner-card-{{ winner.auction_id }}" (for each winner)
  - input id="filter-by-winner"
  - button id="back-to-dashboard"
- Context variables:

  - filter_name: Optional[str]

- Page Title: Trending Auctions
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="trending-page"
  - div id="trending-list"
  - select id="time-range-filter"
  - buttons with ids "view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}"
  - button id="back-to-dashboard"
- Context variables:
  - trending_auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]]
  - time_range: str

### 9. Auction Status Page
- Template file: templates/status.html
- Page Title: Auction Status
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="status-page"
  - select id="status-filter"
  - table id="status-table" (columns: auction name, status, time remaining, current bid)
  - button id="refresh-status-button"
  - button id="back-to-dashboard"
- Context variables:
  - auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]]
  - status_filter: Optional[str]

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)

All files are stored in `data/` directory and pipe-delimited (|) with no header line.

### auctions.txt
- **Fields:** auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | description (str) | category (str) | starting_bid (float) | current_bid (float) | end_time (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) | status (str) | image_url (str)
- **Description:** Stores details of auction items.
- **Example rows:**
```
1|Vintage Leather Watch|Antique leather wristwatch from the 1950s|Collectibles|25.00|45.50|2025-02-15 18:00|Active|watch.jpg
2|iPhone 14 Pro|Latest Apple smartphone in excellent condition|Electronics|500.00|620.00|2025-02-10 12:00|Active|iphone.jpg
3|Wooden Desk|Beautiful oak wood desk with original finish|Furniture|75.00|110.00|2025-02-08 20:00|Closed|desk.jpg
```

### categories.txt
- **Fields:** category_id (int) | category_name (str) | description (str) | item_count (int)
- **Description:** Stores auction categories and counts.
- **Example rows:**
```
1|Electronics|Digital devices and gadgets|15
2|Collectibles|Rare and valuable collector items|28
3|Furniture|Household furniture and decor|12
```

### bids.txt
- **Fields:** bid_id (int) | auction_id (int) | bidder_name (str) | bid_amount (float) | bid_timestamp (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- **Description:** Stores bids placed on auctions.
- **Example rows:**
```
1|1|Alice Johnson|45.50|2025-02-05 14:30
2|2|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45
3|3|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-04 10:15
```

### winners.txt
- **Fields:** winner_id (int) | auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | winner_name (str) | winning_bid (float) | win_date (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD)
- **Description:** Stores winners of auctions.
- **Example rows:**
```
1|3|Wooden Desk|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-08
2|5|Victorian Mirror|Diana Prince|95.00|2025-02-03
3|7|Vintage Books Set|Eve Stewart|150.00|2025-02-01
```

### bid_history.txt
- **Fields:** history_id (int) | auction_id (int) | auction_name (str) | bidder_name (str) | bid_amount (float) | bid_timestamp (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- **Description:** Historical record of bids.
- **Example rows:**
```
1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Alice Johnson|40.00|2025-02-05 13:00
2|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Frank Miller|42.50|2025-02-05 13:45
3|2|iPhone 14 Pro|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45
```

### items.txt
- **Fields:** item_id (int) | auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | starting_price (float) | category (str) | condition (str) | seller_name (str)
- **Description:** Stores details about auction items including condition and seller information.
- **Example rows:**
```
1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|25.00|Collectibles|Excellent|John Collector
2|2|iPhone 14 Pro|500.00|Electronics|Like New|Tech Store
3|3|Wooden Desk|75.00|Furniture|Good|Antique Shop
```

### trending.txt
- **Fields:** auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | bid_count (int) | current_bid (float) | trending_rank (int) | time_period (str)
- **Description:** Stores auction trending data.
- **Example rows:**
```
2|iPhone 14 Pro|12|620.00|1|This Week
1|Vintage Leather Watch|8|45.50|2|This Week
5|Vintage Camera|6|85.00|3|This Week
```

---

End of specification.


=== app.py ===
from flask import Flask, render_template, redirect, url_for, request
import os
from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional

app = Flask(__name__)
app.config['SECRET_KEY'] = 'dev-secret-key'

data_dir = 'data'

# Helper functions to load and save data from pipe-delimited files

def load_auctions() -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
    auctions = []
    filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'auctions.txt')
    if not os.path.exists(filepath):
        return auctions
    with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for line in f:
            parts = line.strip().split('|')
            if len(parts) != 9:
                continue
            auction = {
                'auction_id': int(parts[0]),
                'item_name': parts[1],
                'description': parts[2],
                'category': parts[3],
                'starting_bid': float(parts[4]),
                'current_bid': float(parts[5]),
                'end_time': parts[6],
                'status': parts[7],
                'image_url': parts[8]
            }
            auctions.append(auction)
    return auctions


def save_auctions(auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> None:
    filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'auctions.txt')
    with open(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for a in auctions:
            line = f"{a['auction_id']}|{a['item_name']}|{a['description']}|{a['category']}|{a['starting_bid']:.2f}|{a['current_bid']:.2f}|{a['end_time']}|{a['status']}|{a['image_url']}\n"
            f.write(line)


def load_categories() -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
    categories = []
    filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'categories.txt')
    if not os.path.exists(filepath):
        return categories
    with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for line in f:
            parts = line.strip().split('|')
            if len(parts) != 4:
                continue
            category = {
                'category_id': int(parts[0]),
                'category_name': parts[1],
                'description': parts[2],
                'item_count': int(parts[3])
            }
            categories.append(category)
    return categories


def load_bids() -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
    bids = []
    filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'bids.txt')
    if not os.path.exists(filepath):
        return bids
    with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for line in f:
            parts = line.strip().split('|')
            if len(parts) != 5:
                continue
            bid = {
                'bid_id': int(parts[0]),
                'auction_id': int(parts[1]),
                'bidder_name': parts[2],
                'bid_amount': float(parts[3]),
                'bid_timestamp': parts[4]
            }
            bids.append(bid)
    return bids


def save_bids(bids: List[Dict[str, Any]]) -> None:
    filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'bids.txt')
    with open(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for b in bids:
            line = f"{b['bid_id']}|{b['auction_id']}|{b['bidder_name']}|{b['bid_amount']:.2f}|{b['bid_timestamp']}\n"
            f.write(line)


def load_winners() -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
    winners = []
    filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'winners.txt')
    if not os.path.exists(filepath):
        return winners
    with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for line in f:
            parts = line.strip().split('|')
            if len(parts) != 6:
                continue
            winner = {
                'winner_id': int(parts[0]),
                'auction_id': int(parts[1]),
                'item_name': parts[2],
                'winner_name': parts[3],
                'winning_bid': float(parts[4]),
                'win_date': parts[5]
            }
            winners.append(winner)
    return winners


def load_bid_history() -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
    bid_history = []
    filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'bid_history.txt')
    if not os.path.exists(filepath):
        return bid_history
    with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for line in f:
            parts = line.strip().split('|')
            if len(parts) != 6:
                continue
            history = {
                'history_id': int(parts[0]),
                'auction_id': int(parts[1]),
                'auction_name': parts[2],
                'bidder_name': parts[3],
                'bid_amount': float(parts[4]),
                'bid_timestamp': parts[5]
            }
            bid_history.append(history)
    return bid_history


def load_trending() -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
    trending = []
    filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'trending.txt')
    if not os.path.exists(filepath):
        return trending
    with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for line in f:
            parts = line.strip().split('|')
            if len(parts) != 6:
                continue
            entry = {
                'auction_id': int(parts[0]),
                'item_name': parts[1],
                'bid_count': int(parts[2]),
                'current_bid': float(parts[3]),
                'trending_rank': int(parts[4]),
                'time_period': parts[5]
            }
            trending.append(entry)
    return trending


# Routes

@app.route('/')
def index():
    return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))


@app.route('/dashboard')
def dashboard():
    auctions = load_auctions()
    # Prepare featured_auctions list
    # Let's assume featured auctions are those with status active and soonest end time, or limit to 5
    # Sort active auctions by end_time ascending
    active_auctions = [a for a in auctions if a['status'] == 'Active']
    active_auctions.sort(key=lambda x: x['end_time'])
    featured_auctions = []
    for a in active_auctions[:5]:
        featured_auctions.append({
            'auction_id': a['auction_id'],
            'item_name': a['item_name'],
            'current_bid': a['current_bid'],
            'end_time': a['end_time'],
            'image_url': a['image_url']
        })
    return render_template('dashboard.html', featured_auctions=featured_auctions)


@app.route('/auction/catalog')
def auction_catalog():
    auctions_all = load_auctions()
    categories = load_categories()
    auctions = []
    for a in auctions_all:
        auctions.append({
            'auction_id': a['auction_id'],
            'item_name': a['item_name'],
            'current_bid': a['current_bid'],
            'end_time': a['end_time'],
            'image_url': a['image_url']
        })
    return render_template('catalog.html', auctions=auctions, categories=categories)


@app.route('/auction/<int:auction_id>')
def auction_details(auction_id: int):
    auctions = load_auctions()
    bids = load_bids()
    auction = None
    for a in auctions:
        if a['auction_id'] == auction_id:
            auction = a
            break
    if not auction:
        # Auction not found
        return render_template('auction_details.html', auction=None, bid_history=[], highest_bid=0.0)

    # Extract bid_history for this auction from bids
    bid_history = []
    highest_bid = auction['current_bid']
    for b in bids:
        if b['auction_id'] == auction_id:
            bid_history.append({
                'bid_id': b['bid_id'],
                'bidder_name': b['bidder_name'],
                'bid_amount': b['bid_amount'],
                'bid_timestamp': b['bid_timestamp']
            })
            if b['bid_amount'] > highest_bid:
                highest_bid = b['bid_amount']

    # Sort bid_history by bid_timestamp ascending (oldest first)
    bid_history.sort(key=lambda x: x['bid_timestamp'])

    return render_template('auction_details.html', auction=auction, bid_history=bid_history, highest_bid=highest_bid)


from datetime import datetime

@app.route('/auction/<int:auction_id>/place_bid', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
def place_bid(auction_id: int):
    auctions = load_auctions()
    bids = load_bids()
    auction = None
    for a in auctions:
        if a['auction_id'] == auction_id:
            auction = a
            break
    if not auction:
        # Auction not found
        return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=None, minimum_bid=0.0)

    minimum_bid = max(auction['current_bid'], auction['starting_bid']) + 0.01

    if request.method == 'POST':
        bidder_name = request.form.get('bidder_name', '').strip()
        bid_amount_raw = request.form.get('bid_amount', '')
        try:
            bid_amount = float(bid_amount_raw)
        except ValueError:
            bid_amount = 0.0

        if not bidder_name or bid_amount < minimum_bid:
            # Invalid bid, re-render with minimum_bid info and auction
            return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=auction, minimum_bid=minimum_bid)

        # Add new bid
        new_bid_id = 1
        if bids:
            new_bid_id = max(b['bid_id'] for b in bids) + 1

        # Compose bid timestamp as current time in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM
        bid_timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')

        new_bid = {
            'bid_id': new_bid_id,
            'auction_id': auction_id,
            'bidder_name': bidder_name,
            'bid_amount': bid_amount,
            'bid_timestamp': bid_timestamp
        }

        # Append to bids
        bids.append(new_bid)
        save_bids(bids)

        # Update auction current_bid if bid_amount is higher
        if bid_amount > auction['current_bid']:
            auction['current_bid'] = bid_amount
            # Save auctions
            save_auctions(auctions)

        # Redirect to auction details page
        return redirect(url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction_id))

    return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=auction, minimum_bid=minimum_bid)


@app.route('/bid/history')
def bid_history():
    bids = load_bids()
    auctions = load_auctions()

    # Collect auction id to item_name mapping
    auction_name_map = {a['auction_id']: a['item_name'] for a in auctions}

    # Get selected auction_id from query parameter or None
    selected_auction_id = request.args.get('auction_id', default=None, type=int)

    filtered_bids = []
    for b in bids:
        if selected_auction_id is None or b['auction_id'] == selected_auction_id:
            filtered_bids.append({
                'bid_id': b['bid_id'],
                'auction_id': b['auction_id'],
                'auction_name': auction_name_map.get(b['auction_id'], 'Unknown'),
                'bidder_name': b['bidder_name'],
                'bid_amount': b['bid_amount'],
                'bid_timestamp': b['bid_timestamp']
            })

    # Sort bids by bid_timestamp descending (latest first)
    filtered_bids.sort(key=lambda x: x['bid_timestamp'], reverse=True)

    return render_template('bid_history.html', bids=filtered_bids, selected_auction_id=selected_auction_id)


@app.route('/categories')
def categories():
    categories = load_categories()
    return render_template('categories.html', categories=categories)


@app.route('/winners')
def winners():
    winners = load_winners()
    filter_name = request.args.get('filter_name', default=None, type=str)
    if filter_name:
        filter_name_lower = filter_name.lower()
        winners = [w for w in winners if filter_name_lower in w['winner_name'].lower()]
    return render_template('winners.html', winners=winners, filter_name=filter_name)


@app.route('/trending')
def trending_auctions():
    trending = load_trending()
    # time_range from query string or default "This Week"
    time_range = request.args.get('time_range', 'This Week')
    trending_auctions = [t for t in trending if t['time_period'] == time_range]

    # Sort by trending_rank ascending
    trending_auctions.sort(key=lambda x: x['trending_rank'])

    return render_template('trending.html', trending_auctions=trending_auctions, time_range=time_range)


@app.route('/status')
def status():
    auctions = load_auctions()
    status_filter = request.args.get('status_filter', default=None, type=str)
    filtered_auctions = []
    for a in auctions:
        if status_filter is None or a['status'].lower() == status_filter.lower():
            filtered_auctions.append({
                'auction_id': a['auction_id'],
                'item_name': a['item_name'],
                'status': a['status'],
                'end_time': a['end_time'],
                'current_bid': a['current_bid']
            })
    return render_template('status.html', auctions=filtered_auctions, status_filter=status_filter)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run(debug=True, port=5000)
