templates/trending.html  | trending_auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, bid_count: int, current_bid: float, trending_rank: int, time_period: str),                                                time_range: str                                                                                      | | /status                        | status                | GET            | templates/status.html    | auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, status: str, end_time: str, current_bid: float),                                                status_filter: str (optional)                                                                    |  ---  ## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification (Frontend)  ### 1. Dashboard Page - Template file: templates/dashboard.html - Page Title: Auction Dashboard - IDs and Elements:   - div id="dashboard-page"   - div id="featured-auctions"   - button id="browse-auctions-button" (navigates to auction_catalog function)   - button id="view-bids-button" (navigates to bid_history function)   - button id="trending-auctions-button" (navigates to trending_auctions function) - Context variables:   - featured_auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str)  ### 2. Auction Catalog Page - Template file: templates/catalog.html - Page Title: Auction Catalog - IDs and Elements:   - div id="catalog-page"   - input id="search-input" (text input for search)   - select id="category-filter" (dropdown for category filter)   - div id="auctions-grid" (grid displaying auctions)   - buttons with dynamic ids e.g. id="view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}" (navigate to auction_details) - Context variables:   - auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]]   - categories: List[Dict[str, Any]]  ### 3. Auction Details Page - Template file: templates/auction_details.html - Page Title: Auction Details - IDs and Elements:   - div id="auction-details-page"   - h1 id="auction-title"   - div id="auction-description"   - div id="current-bid"   - button id="place-bid-button" (links to place_bid page)   - div id="bid-history" - Context variables:   - auction: Dict[str, Any]   - bid_history: List[Dict[str, Any]]   - highest_bid: float  ### 4. Place Bid Page - Template file: templates/place_bid.html - Page Title: Place Bid - IDs and Elements:   - div id="place-bid-page"   - input id="bidder-name" (text)   - input id="bid-amount" (number)   - div id="auction-name"   - div id="minimum-bid"   - button id="submit-bid-button" - Context variables:   - auction: Dict[str, Any]   - minimum_bid: float  ### 5. Bid History Page - Template file: templates/bid_history.html - Page Title: Bid History - IDs and Elements:   - div id="bid-history-page"   - table id="bids-table" (columns: bid ID, auction name, bidder, amount, timestamp)   - select id="filter-by-auction"   - button id="sort-by-amount"   - button id="back-to-dashboard" - Context variables:   - bids: List[Dict[str, Any]]   - selected_auction_id: Optional[int]  ### 6. Auction Categories Page - Template file: templates/categories.html - Page Title: Auction Categories - IDs and Elements:   - div id="categories-page"   - div id="categories-list"   - div id="category-card-{{ category.category_id }}" (for each category)   - button id="view-category-button-{{ category.category_id }}"   - button id="back-to-dashboard" - Context variables:   - categories: List[Dict[str, Any]]  ### 7. Winners Page - Template file: templates/winners.html - Page Title: Winning Items - IDs and Elements:   - div id="winners-page"   - div id="winners-list"   - div id="winner-card-{{ winner.auction_id }}" (for each winner)   - input id="filter-by-winner"   - button id="back-to-dashboard" - Context variables:   - winners: List[Dict[str, Any]]   - filter_name: Optional[str]  ### 8. Trending Auctions Page - Template file: templates/trending.html - Page Title: Trending Auctions - IDs and Elements:   - div id="trending-page"   - div id="trending-list"   - select id="time-range-filter"   - buttons with ids "view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}"   - button id="back-to-dashboard" - Context variables:   - trending_auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]]   - time_range: str  ### 9. Auction Status Page - Template file: templates/status.html - Page Title: Auction Status - IDs and Elements:   - div id="status-page"   - select id="status-filter"   - table id="status-table" (columns: auction name, status, time remaining, current bid)   - button id="refresh-status-button"   - button id="back-to-dashboard" - Context variables:   - auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]]   - status_filter: Optional[str]  ---  ## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)  All files are stored in `data/` directory and pipe-delimited (|) with no header line.  ### auctions.txt - **Fields:** auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | description (str) | category (str) | starting_bid (float) | current_bid (float) | end_time (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) | status (str) | image_url (str) - **Description:** Stores details of auction items. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|Vintage Leather Watch|Antique leather wristwatch from the 1950s|Collectibles|25.00|45.50|2025-02-15 18:00|Active|watch.jpg 2|iPhone 14 Pro|Latest Apple smartphone in excellent condition|Electronics|500.00|620.00|2025-02-10 12:00|Active|iphone.jpg 3|Wooden Desk|Beautiful oak wood desk with original finish|Furniture|75.00|110.00|2025-02-08 20:00|Closed|desk.jpg ```  ### categories.txt - **Fields:** category_id (int) | category_name (str) | description (str) | item_count (int) - **Description:** Stores auction categories and counts. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|Electronics|Digital devices and gadgets|15 2|Collectibles|Rare and valuable collector items|28 3|Furniture|Household furniture and decor|12 ```  ### bids.txt - **Fields:** bid_id (int) | auction_id (int) | bidder_name (str) | bid_amount (float) | bid_timestamp (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) - **Description:** Stores bids placed on auctions. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|1|Alice Johnson|45.50|2025-02-05 14:30 2|2|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45 3|3|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-04 10:15 ```  ### winners.txt - **Fields:** winner_id (int) | auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | winner_name (str) | winning_bid (float) | win_date (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD) - **Description:** Stores winners of auctions. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|3|Wooden Desk|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-08 2|5|Victorian Mirror|Diana Prince|95.00|2025-02-03 3|7|Vintage Books Set|Eve Stewart|150.00|2025-02-01 ```  ### bid_history.txt - **Fields:** history_id (int) | auction_id (int) | auction_name (str) | bidder_name (str) | bid_amount (float) | bid_timestamp (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) - **Description:** Historical record of bids. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Alice Johnson|40.00|2025-02-05 13:00 2|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Frank Miller|42.50|2025-02-05 13:45 3|2|iPhone 14 Pro|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45 ```  ### items.txt - **Fields:** item_id (int) | auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | starting_price (float) | category (str) | condition (str) | seller_name (str) - **Description:** Stores details about auction items including condition and seller information. - **Example rows:** ``` 1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|25.00|Collectibles|Excellent|John Collector 2|2|iPhone 14 Pro|500.00|Electronics|Like New|Tech Store 3|3|Wooden Desk|75.00|Furniture|Good|Antique Shop ```  ### trending.txt - **Fields:** auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | bid_count (int) | current_bid (float) | trending_rank (int) | time_period (str) - **Description:** Stores auction trending data. - **Example rows:** ``` 2|iPhone 14 Pro|12|620.00|1|This Week 1|Vintage Leather Watch|8|45.50|2|This Week 5|Vintage Camera|6|85.00|3|This Week ```  ---  End of specification.

# OnlineAuction Web Application Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification (Backend)

| Route Path                          | Function Name         | HTTP Method(s) | Template to Render       | Context Variables (Type Annotations)                                                                                                  |
|-----------------------------------|-----------------------|----------------|-------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| /                                 | index                 | GET            | N/A (redirect to dashboard) | None                                                                                                                           |
| /dashboard                        | dashboard             | GET            | templates/dashboard.html | featured_auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str)             |
| /auction/catalog                  | auction_catalog       | GET            | templates/catalog.html   | auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str), 
                                                                               categories: List[Dict[str, Any]] (category_id: int, category_name: str)                                                            |
| /auction/<int:auction_id>         | auction_details       | GET            | templates/auction_details.html | auction: Dict[str, Any] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, description: str, category: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, status: str, image_url: str),
                                                                       bid_history: List[Dict[str, Any]] (bid_id: int, bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float, bid_timestamp: str),
                                                                       highest_bid: float                                                      |
| /auction/<int:auction_id>/place_bid | place_bid          | GET, POST      | templates/place_bid.html  | auction: Dict[str, Any] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float), minimum_bid: float
 POST form data: bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float                                                             |
| /bid/history                     | bid_history           | GET            | templates/bid_history.html | bids: List[Dict[str, Any]] (bid_id: int, auction_id: int, auction_name: str, bidder_name: str, bid_amount: float, bid_timestamp: str), 
                                               selected_auction_id: int or None                                                                                          |
| /categories                     | categories            | GET            | templates/categories.html| categories: List[Dict[str, Any]] (category_id: int, category_name: str, description: str, item_count: int)                             |
| /winners                       | winners               | GET            | templates/winners.html   | winners: List[Dict[str, Any]] (winner_id: int, auction_id: int, item_name: str, winner_name: str, winning_bid: float, win_date: str),
                                   filter_name: str (optional)                                                                                   |
| /trending                      | trending_auctions     | GET            | templates/trending.html  | trending_auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, bid_count: int, current_bid: float, trending_rank: int, time_period: str),
                                               time_range: str                                                                                      |
| /status                        | status                | GET            | templates/status.html    | auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, status: str, end_time: str, current_bid: float),
                                               status_filter: str (optional)                                                                    |

---

## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification (Frontend)

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Template file: templates/dashboard.html
- Page Title: Auction Dashboard
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="dashboard-page"
  - div id="featured-auctions"
  - button id="browse-auctions-button" (navigates to auction_catalog function)
  - button id="view-bids-button" (navigates to bid_history function)
  - button id="trending-auctions-button" (navigates to trending_auctions function)
- Context variables:
  - featured_auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]] (auction_id: int, item_name: str, current_bid: float, end_time: str, image_url: str)

### 2. Auction Catalog Page
- Template file: templates/catalog.html
- Page Title: Auction Catalog
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="catalog-page"
  - input id="search-input" (text input for search)
  - select id="category-filter" (dropdown for category filter)
  - div id="auctions-grid" (grid displaying auctions)
  - buttons with dynamic ids e.g. id="view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}" (navigate to auction_details)
- Context variables:
  - auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]]
  - categories: List[Dict[str, Any]]

### 3. Auction Details Page
- Template file: templates/auction_details.html
- Page Title: Auction Details
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="auction-details-page"
  - h1 id="auction-title"
  - div id="auction-description"
  - div id="current-bid"
  - button id="place-bid-button" (links to place_bid page)
  - div id="bid-history"
- Context variables:
  - auction: Dict[str, Any]
  - bid_history: List[Dict[str, Any]]
  - highest_bid: float

### 4. Place Bid Page
- Template file: templates/place_bid.html
- Page Title: Place Bid
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="place-bid-page"
  - input id="bidder-name" (text)
  - input id="bid-amount" (number)
  - div id="auction-name"
  - div id="minimum-bid"
  - button id="submit-bid-button"
- Context variables:
  - auction: Dict[str, Any]
  - minimum_bid: float

### 5. Bid History Page
- Template file: templates/bid_history.html
- Page Title: Bid History
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="bid-history-page"
  - table id="bids-table" (columns: bid ID, auction name, bidder, amount, timestamp)
  - select id="filter-by-auction"
  - button id="sort-by-amount"
  - button id="back-to-dashboard"
- Context variables:
  - bids: List[Dict[str, Any]]
  - selected_auction_id: Optional[int]

### 6. Auction Categories Page
- Template file: templates/categories.html
- Page Title: Auction Categories
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="categories-page"
  - div id="categories-list"
  - div id="category-card-{{ category.category_id }}" (for each category)
  - button id="view-category-button-{{ category.category_id }}"
  - button id="back-to-dashboard"
- Context variables:
  - categories: List[Dict[str, Any]]

### 7. Winners Page
- Template file: templates/winners.html
- Page Title: Winning Items
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="winners-page"
  - div id="winners-list"
  - div id="winner-card-{{ winner.auction_id }}" (for each winner)
  - input id="filter-by-winner"
  - button id="back-to-dashboard"
- Context variables:
  - winners: List[Dict[str, Any]]
  - filter_name: Optional[str]

- Template file: templates/trending.html
- Page Title: Trending Auctions
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="trending-page"
  - div id="trending-list"
  - select id="time-range-filter"
  - buttons with ids "view-auction-button-{{ auction.auction_id }}"
  - button id="back-to-dashboard"
- Context variables:
  - trending_auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]]
  - time_range: str

### 9. Auction Status Page
- Template file: templates/status.html
- Page Title: Auction Status
- IDs and Elements:
  - div id="status-page"
  - select id="status-filter"
  - table id="status-table" (columns: auction name, status, time remaining, current bid)
  - button id="refresh-status-button"
  - button id="back-to-dashboard"
- Context variables:
  - auctions: List[Dict[str, Any]]
  - status_filter: Optional[str]

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend)

All files are stored in `data/` directory and pipe-delimited (|) with no header line.

### auctions.txt
- **Fields:** auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | description (str) | category (str) | starting_bid (float) | current_bid (float) | end_time (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM) | status (str) | image_url (str)
- **Description:** Stores details of auction items.
- **Example rows:**
```
1|Vintage Leather Watch|Antique leather wristwatch from the 1950s|Collectibles|25.00|45.50|2025-02-15 18:00|Active|watch.jpg
2|iPhone 14 Pro|Latest Apple smartphone in excellent condition|Electronics|500.00|620.00|2025-02-10 12:00|Active|iphone.jpg
3|Wooden Desk|Beautiful oak wood desk with original finish|Furniture|75.00|110.00|2025-02-08 20:00|Closed|desk.jpg
```

### categories.txt
- **Fields:** category_id (int) | category_name (str) | description (str) | item_count (int)
- **Description:** Stores auction categories and counts.
- **Example rows:**
```
1|Electronics|Digital devices and gadgets|15
2|Collectibles|Rare and valuable collector items|28
3|Furniture|Household furniture and decor|12
```

### bids.txt
- **Fields:** bid_id (int) | auction_id (int) | bidder_name (str) | bid_amount (float) | bid_timestamp (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- **Description:** Stores bids placed on auctions.
- **Example rows:**
```
1|1|Alice Johnson|45.50|2025-02-05 14:30
2|2|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45
3|3|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-04 10:15
```

### winners.txt
- **Fields:** winner_id (int) | auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | winner_name (str) | winning_bid (float) | win_date (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD)
- **Description:** Stores winners of auctions.
- **Example rows:**
```
1|3|Wooden Desk|Charlie Brown|110.00|2025-02-08
2|5|Victorian Mirror|Diana Prince|95.00|2025-02-03
3|7|Vintage Books Set|Eve Stewart|150.00|2025-02-01
```

### bid_history.txt
- **Fields:** history_id (int) | auction_id (int) | auction_name (str) | bidder_name (str) | bid_amount (float) | bid_timestamp (str, datetime format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- **Description:** Historical record of bids.
- **Example rows:**
```
1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Alice Johnson|40.00|2025-02-05 13:00
2|1|Vintage Leather Watch|Frank Miller|42.50|2025-02-05 13:45
3|2|iPhone 14 Pro|Bob Williams|620.00|2025-02-05 15:45
```

### items.txt
- **Fields:** item_id (int) | auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | starting_price (float) | category (str) | condition (str) | seller_name (str)
- **Description:** Stores details about auction items including condition and seller information.
- **Example rows:**
```
1|1|Vintage Leather Watch|25.00|Collectibles|Excellent|John Collector
2|2|iPhone 14 Pro|500.00|Electronics|Like New|Tech Store
3|3|Wooden Desk|75.00|Furniture|Good|Antique Shop
```

### trending.txt
- **Fields:** auction_id (int) | item_name (str) | bid_count (int) | current_bid (float) | trending_rank (int) | time_period (str)
- **Description:** Stores auction trending data.
- **Example rows:**
```
2|iPhone 14 Pro|12|620.00|1|This Week
1|Vintage Leather Watch|8|45.50|2|This Week
5|Vintage Camera|6|85.00|3|This Week
```

---

End of specification.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Auction Details</title>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="auction-details-page">
        <h1 id="auction-title">Auction Details</h1>

        <div id="auction-description">
            {{ auction.description }}
        </div>

        <div id="current-bid">
            Current Bid: ${{ '%.2f' | format(auction.current_bid) }}
        </div>

        <a href="{{ url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction.auction_id) }}">
            <button id="place-bid-button">Place Bid</button>
        </a>

        <div id="bid-history">
            <h2>Bid History</h2>
            <ul>
                {% for bid in bid_history %}
                    <li id="bid-{{ bid.bid_id }}">{{ bid.bidder_name }} bid ${{ '%.2f' | format(bid.bid_amount) }} at {{ bid.bid_timestamp }}</li>
                {% endfor %}
            </ul>
        </div>
    </div>
</body>
</html>


=== /home/jun/0624/CaMP/results/Software-web-rebuttal/compound_timeout_300/OnlineAuction/compound_chaos/templates/bid_history.html ===
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Bid History</title>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="bid-history-page">
        <h1>Bid History</h1>

        <select id="filter-by-auction" name="filter-by-auction">
            <option value="">All Auctions</option>
            {% set seen_auction_ids = [] %}
            {% for bid in bids %}
                {% if bid.auction_id not in seen_auction_ids %}
                    <option value="{{ bid.auction_id }}" {% if selected_auction_id == bid.auction_id %}selected{% endif %}>{{ bid.auction_name }}</option>
                    {% do seen_auction_ids.append(bid.auction_id) %}
                {% endif %}
            {% endfor %}
        </select>

        <button id="sort-by-amount">Sort by Amount</button>

        <table id="bids-table" border="1">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>Bid ID</th>
                    <th>Auction Name</th>
                    <th>Bidder</th>
                    <th>Amount</th>
                    <th>Timestamp</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for bid in bids %}
                    {% if selected_auction_id == None or selected_auction_id == bid.auction_id %}
                    <tr id="bid-{{ bid.bid_id }}">
                        <td>{{ bid.bid_id }}</td>
                        <td>{{ bid.auction_name }}</td>
                        <td>{{ bid.bidder_name }}</td>
                        <td>${{ '%.2f' | format(bid.bid_amount) }}</td>
                        <td>{{ bid.bid_timestamp }}</td>
                    </tr>
                    {% endif %}
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>

        <a href="{{ url_for('dashboard') }}"><button id="back-to-dashboard">Back to Dashboard</button></a>
    </div>
</body>
</html>

float(parts[4]),                 'win_date': parts[5]             }             winners.append(winner)     return winners   def load_bid_history() -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:     bid_history = []     filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'bid_history.txt')     if not os.path.exists(filepath):         return bid_history     with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for line in f:             parts = line.strip().split('|')             if len(parts) != 6:                 continue             history = {                 'history_id': int(parts[0]),                 'auction_id': int(parts[1]),                 'auction_name': parts[2],                 'bidder_name': parts[3],                 'bid_amount': float(parts[4]),                 'bid_timestamp': parts[5]             }             bid_history.append(history)     return bid_history   def load_trending() -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:     trending = []     filepath = os.path.join(data_dir, 'trending.txt')     if not os.path.exists(filepath):         return trending     with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for line in f:             parts = line.strip().split('|')             if len(parts) != 6:                 continue             entry = {                 'auction_id': int(parts[0]),                 'item_name': parts[1],                 'bid_count': int(parts[2]),                 'current_bid': float(parts[3]),                 'trending_rank': int(parts[4]),                 'time_period': parts[5]             }             trending.append(entry)     return trending   # Routes  @app.route('/') def index():     return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))   @app.route('/dashboard') def dashboard():     auctions = load_auctions()     # Prepare featured_auctions list     # Let's assume featured auctions are those with status active and soonest end time, or limit to 5     # Sort active auctions by end_time ascending     active_auctions = [a for a in auctions if a['status'] == 'Active']     active_auctions.sort(key=lambda x: x['end_time'])     featured_auctions = []     for a in active_auctions[:5]:         featured_auctions.append({             'auction_id': a['auction_id'],             'item_name': a['item_name'],             'current_bid': a['current_bid'],             'end_time': a['end_time'],             'image_url': a['image_url']         })     return render_template('dashboard.html', featured_auctions=featured_auctions)   @app.route('/auction/catalog') def auction_catalog():     auctions_all = load_auctions()     categories = load_categories()     auctions = []     for a in auctions_all:         auctions.append({             'auction_id': a['auction_id'],             'item_name': a['item_name'],             'current_bid': a['current_bid'],             'end_time': a['end_time'],             'image_url': a['image_url']         })     return render_template('catalog.html', auctions=auctions, categories=categories)   @app.route('/auction/<int:auction_id>') def auction_details(auction_id: int):     auctions = load_auctions()     bids = load_bids()     auction = None     for a in auctions:         if a['auction_id'] == auction_id:             auction = a             break     if not auction:         # Auction not found         return render_template('auction_details.html', auction=None, bid_history=[], highest_bid=0.0)      # Extract bid_history for this auction from bids     bid_history = []     highest_bid = auction['current_bid']     for b in bids:         if b['auction_id'] == auction_id:             bid_history.append({                 'bid_id': b['bid_id'],                 'bidder_name': b['bidder_name'],                 'bid_amount': b['bid_amount'],                 'bid_timestamp': b['bid_timestamp']             })             if b['bid_amount'] > highest_bid:                 highest_bid = b['bid_amount']      # Sort bid_history by bid_timestamp ascending (oldest first)     bid_history.sort(key=lambda x: x['bid_timestamp'])      return render_template('auction_details.html', auction=auction, bid_history=bid_history, highest_bid=highest_bid)   from datetime import datetime  @app.route('/auction/<int:auction_id>/place_bid', methods=['GET', 'POST']) def place_bid(auction_id: int):     auctions = load_auctions()     bids = load_bids()     auction = None     for a in auctions:         if a['auction_id'] == auction_id:             auction = a             break     if not auction:         # Auction not found         return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=None, minimum_bid=0.0)      minimum_bid = max(auction['current_bid'], auction['starting_bid']) + 0.01      if request.method == 'POST':         bidder_name = request.form.get('bidder_name', '').strip()         bid_amount_raw = request.form.get('bid_amount', '')         try:             bid_amount = float(bid_amount_raw)         except ValueError:             bid_amount = 0.0          if not bidder_name or bid_amount < minimum_bid:             # Invalid bid, re-render with minimum_bid info and auction             return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=auction, minimum_bid=minimum_bid)          # Add new bid         new_bid_id = 1         if bids:             new_bid_id = max(b['bid_id'] for b in bids) + 1          # Compose bid timestamp as current time in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM         bid_timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')          new_bid = {             'bid_id': new_bid_id,             'auction_id': auction_id,             'bidder_name': bidder_name,             'bid_amount': bid_amount,             'bid_timestamp': bid_timestamp         }          # Append to bids         bids.append(new_bid)         save_bids(bids)          # Update auction current_bid if bid_amount is higher         if bid_amount > auction['current_bid']:             auction['current_bid'] = bid_amount             # Save auctions             save_auctions(auctions)          # Redirect to auction details page         return redirect(url_for('auction_details', auction_id=auction_id))      return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=auction, minimum_bid=minimum_bid)   @app.route('/bid/history') def bid_history():     bids = load_bids()     auctions = load_auctions()      # Collect auction id to item_name mapping     auction_name_map = {a['auction_id']: a['item_name'] for a in auctions}      # Get selected auction_id from query parameter or None     selected_auction_id = request.args.get('auction_id', default=None, type=int)      filtered_bids = []     for b in bids:         if selected_auction_id is None or b['auction_id'] == selected_auction_id:             filtered_bids.append({                 'bid_id': b['bid_id'],                 'auction_id': b['auction_id'],                 'auction_name': auction_name_map.get(b['auction_id'], 'Unknown'),                 'bidder_name': b['bidder_name'],                 'bid_amount': b['bid_amount'],                 'bid_timestamp': b['bid_timestamp']             })      # Sort bids by bid_timestamp descending (latest first)     filtered_bids.sort(key=lambda x: x['bid_timestamp'], reverse=True)      return render_template('bid_history.html', bids=filtered_bids, selected_auction_id=selected_auction_id)   @app.route('/categories') def categories():     categories = load_categories()     return render_template('categories.html', categories=categories)   @app.route('/winners') def winners():     winners = load_winners()     filter_name = request.args.get('filter_name', default=None, type=str)     if filter_name:         filter_name_lower = filter_name.lower()         winners = [w for w in winners if filter_name_lower in w['winner_name'].lower()]     return render_template('winners.html', winners=winners, filter_name=filter_name)   @app.route('/trending') def trending_auctions():     trending = == time_range]      # Sort by trending_rank ascending     trending_auctions.sort(key=lambda x: x['trending_rank'])      return render_template('trending.html', trending_auctions=trending_auctions, time_range=time_range)   @app.route('/status') def status():     auctions = load_auctions()     status_filter = request.args.get('status_filter', default=None, type=str)     filtered_auctions = []     for a in auctions:         if status_filter is None or a['status'].lower() == status_filter.lower():             filtered_auctions.append({                 'auction_id': a['auction_id'],     <div id="auction-details-page">
        <h1 id="auction-title">Auction Details</h1>

        <div id="auction-description">
            {{ auction.description }}
        </div>

        <div id="current-bid">
            Current Bid: ${{ '%.2f' | format(auction.current_bid) }}
        </div>

        <a href="{{ url_for('place_bid', auction_id=auction.auction_id) }}">
            <button id="place-bid-button">Place Bid</button>
        </a>

        <div id="bid-history">
            <h2>Bid History</h2>
            <ul>
                {% for bid in bid_history %}
                    <li id="bid-{{ bid.bid_id }}">{{ bid.bidder_name }} bid ${{ '%.2f' | format(bid.bid_amount) }} at {{ bid.bid_timestamp }}</li>
                {% endfor %}
            </ul>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Bid History</title>
</head>
<body>
    <div id="bid-history-page">
        <h1>Bid History</h1>

        <select id="filter-by-auction" name="filter-by-auction">
            <option value="">All Auctions</option>
            {% set seen_auction_ids = [] %}
            {% for bid in bids %}
                {% if bid.auction_id not in seen_auction_ids %}
                    <option value="{{ bid.auction_id }}" {% if selected_auction_id == bid.auction_id %}selected{% endif %}>{{ bid.auction_name }}</option>
                    {% do seen_auction_ids.append(bid.auction_id) %}
                {% endif %}
            {% endfor %}
        </select>

        <button id="sort-by-amount">Sort by Amount</button>

        <table id="bids-table" border="1">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th>Bid ID</th>
                    <th>Auction Name</th>
                    <th>Bidder</th>
                    <th>Amount</th>
                    <th>Timestamp</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                {% for bid in bids %}
                    {% if selected_auction_id == None or selected_auction_id == bid.auction_id %}
                    <tr id="bid-{{ bid.bid_id }}">
                        <td>{{ bid.bid_id }}</td>
                        <td>{{ bid.auction_name }}</td>
                        <td>{{ bid.bidder_name }}</td>
                        <td>${{ '%.2f' | format(bid.bid_amount) }}</td>
                        <td>{{ bid.bid_timestamp }}</td>
                    </tr>
                    {% endif %}
                {% endfor %}
            </tbody>
        </table>

        <a href="{{ url_for('dashboard') }}"><button id="back-to-dashboard">Back to Dashboard</button></a>
    </div>
</body>

new_prompt="""
You are a Frontend Software Test Engineer specializing in thorough validation of Flask HTML/Jinja2 templates for the OnlineAuction web application.

Your primary goal is to perform comprehensive testing of all frontend templates in the `templates/` directory to ensure correct UI structure, presence and casing of required HTML element IDs, accurate navigation flows, and proper usage of Jinja2 templating constructs, strictly adhering to all project UI specifications.

**Task Details:**
- Parse all `templates/*.html` files provided in CONTEXT.
- Confirm existence and exact casing of all required element IDs per page, including static and repeated dynamic elements.
- Validate page titles match specification exactly.
- Check all navigation buttons and links navigate to correct URLs/routes.
- Verify correct usage of Jinja2 constructs (loops, conditionals) for dynamic content rendering.
- Ensure templates handle cases with empty or missing data gracefully.

**Testing Strategy:**

=== backend_feedback.txt ===
NEED_MODIFY

Detailed Findings:
- The application loads the required data files correctly and the counts match expectations.
- Most routes return HTTP 200 or expected 302 redirect for valid inputs.
- However, requests to invalid auction IDs (e.g., /auction/999 and /auction/999/place_bid) produce 500 Internal Server Errors. These should be handled gracefully with 404 error responses or informative error pages.
- The /bid/history route also triggers a 500 Internal Server Error, indicating a probable backend issue that needs fixing.
- Routes dealing with categories, winners, trending auctions, and status filtering behave correctly with 200 status and correct page content.
- Bid placing workflow on valid auctions works, including POST redirect on success and form re-display on validation failure.

Recommendations:
- Implement proper error handling for missing auctions across all relevant routes.
- Investigate and resolve the root cause of the internal error on /bid/history route.
- Improve validation and error feedback to users when invalid data is provided.

This backend requires modification to ensure robustness and improved error handling before approval.

data at startup\nauctions = load_auctions()\ncategories = load_categories()\nbids = load_bids()\n\n# Associate bids with auctions\nfor bid in bids:\n    auction = auctions.get(bid['auction_id'])\n    if auction:\n        auction['bids'].append(bid)\n\n\n@app.route('/')\ndef index():\n    return render_template('index.html', auctions=auctions.values(), categories=categories)\n\n\n@app.route('/auction/<auction_id>')\ndef auction_detail(auction_id):\n    auction = auctions.get(auction_id)\n    if not auction:\n        abort(404, description='Auction not found')\n    return render_template('auction_detail.html', auction=auction, categories=categories)\n\n\n@app.route('/auction/<auction_id>/place_bid', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef place_bid(auction_id):\n    auction = auctions.get(auction_id)\n    if not auction:\n        abort(404, description='Auction not found')\n\n    if auction['status'].lower() != 'open':\n        flash('This auction is not open for bidding.')\n        return redirect(url_for('auction_detail', auction_id=auction_id))\n\n    if request.method == 'POST':\n        bidder = request.form.get('bidder', '').strip()\n        amount_str = request.form.get('amount', '').strip()\n\n        if not bidder:\n            flash('Bidder name is required.')\n            return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=auction)\n\n        try:\n            amount = float(amount_str)\n        except ValueError:\n            flash('Invalid bid amount.')\n            return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=auction)\n\n        current_max = max((bid['amount'] for bid in auction['bids']), default=auction['starting_price'])\n\n        if amount <= current_max:\n            flash(f'Bid must be higher than the current highest bid ({current_max}).')\n            return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=auction)\n\n        # Add and save the new bid\n        new_id = str(len(bids) + 1)\n        new_bid = {\n            'id': new_id,\n            'auction_id': auction_id,\n            'bidder': bidder,\n            'amount': amount\n        }\n\n        bids.append(new_bid)\n        auction['bids'].append(new_bid)\n\n        try:\n            with open(os.path.join(data_dir, 'bids.txt'), 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n                f.write(f\"{new_id}|{auction_id}|{bidder}|{amount}\\n\")\n        except Exception:\n            bids.pop()\n            auction['bids'].pop()\n            flash('Failed to save bid. Please try again later.')\n            return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=auction)\n\n        return redirect(url_for('auction_detail', auction_id=auction_id))\n\n    return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=auction)\n\n\n@app.route('/categories')\ndef categories_view():\n    return render_template('categories.html', categories=categories)\n\n\n@app.route('/category/<category_id>')\ndef auctions_by_category(category_id):\n    if category_id not in categories:\n        abort(404, description='Category not found')\n    filtered_auctions = [a for a in auctions.values() if a['category_id'] == category_id]\n    return render_template('category_auctions.html', auctions=filtered_auctions, category=categories[category_id])\n\n\n@app.route('/bid/history')\ndef bid_history():\n    try:\n        sorted_bids = sorted(bids, key=lambda b: int(b['id']))\n    except Exception:\n        sorted_bids = bids\n    return render_template('bid_history.html', bids=sorted_bids, auctions=auctions)\n\n\n@app.route('/winners')\ndef winners_view():\n    winners_list = []\n    for auction in auctions.values():\n        if auction['status'].lower() == 'closed' and auction['bids']:\n            highest_bid = max(auction['bids'], key=lambda b: b['amount'])\n            winners_list.append({'auction': auction, 'winner_bid': highest_bid})\n    return render_template('winners.html', winners=winners_list)\n\n\n@app.route('/trending')\ndef trending_auctions():\n    sorted_auctions = sorted(auctions.values(), key=lambda a: len(a['bids']), reverse=True)\n    return render_template('trending.html', auctions=sorted_auctions[:10])\n\n\n@app.route('/status/<status_filter>')\ndef status_filter_route(status_filter):\n    filtered_auctions = [a for a in auctions.values() if a['status'].lower() == status_filter.lower()]\n    return render_template('status.html', auctions=filtered_auctions, status=status_filter)\n\n\n@app.errorhandler(404)\ndef not_found(error):\n    message = getattr(error, 'description', 'Resource not found')\n    return render_template('404.html', message=message), 404\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    app.run(debug=True)\n"})

Detailed Findings:
- The application loads the required data files correctly and the counts match expectations.
- Most routes return HTTP 200 or expected 302 redirect for valid inputs.
- However, requests to invalid auction IDs (e.g., /auction/999 and /auction/999/place_bid) produce 500 Internal Server Errors. These should be handled gracefully with 404 error responses or informative error pages.

- Bid placing workflow on valid auctions works, including POST redirect on success and form re-display on validation failure.

- Implement proper error handling for missing auctions across all relevant routes.
- Investigate and resolve the root cause of the internal error on /bid/history route.
- Improve validation and error feedback to users when invalid data is provided.

place_bid(auction_id):\n    auction = auctions.get(auction_id)\n    if not auction:\n        abort(404, description='Auction not found')\n    if auction['status'].lower() != 'open':\n        flash('This auction is not open for bidding.')\n        return redirect(url_for('auction_detail', auction_id=auction_id))\n\n    if request.method == 'POST':\n        bidder = flash('Invalid amount value.')\n            return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=auction)\n\n        if not bidder:\n            flash('Bidder name is required.')\n            return current_max_bid:\n            flash(f'Bid must be higher than current maximum bid ({current_max_bid}).')\n            return render_template('place_bid.html', auction=auction)\n\n        # Add new    filtered_auctions = [a for a in auctions.values() if a['category_id'] == category_id]\n    return render_template('category_auctions.html', auctions=filtered_auctions, status_filter.lower()]\n    return render_template('status.html', auctions=filtered_auctions, status=status_filter)\n\n\n@app.errorhandler(404)\ndef not_found(error):\n    message = getattr(error, max([bid['amount'] for bid in auction['bids']], default=auction['starting_price'])\n        if amount <= current_max:\n            return 'Bid too low', 400\n\n        bid_id = str(len(bids) + 1)\n        new_bid = {'id': bid_id, 'auction_id': auction_id, 'bidder': bidder, 'amount': amount}\n        bids.append(new_bid)\n        auction['bids'].append(new_bid)\n        return f'Bid accepted: {amount}', 200\n\n    return render_template_string('Auction detail: {{ auction }}', auction=auction)\n\n@app.route('/categories')\ndef show_categories():\n    return render_template_string('Categories page: {{ categories }}', categories=list(categories.values()))\n\n@app.route('/trending')\ndef trending():\n    trending_auctions = sorted(auctions.values(), key=lambda a: len(a['bids']), reverse=True)\n    return render_template_string('Trending auctions: {{ auctions }}', auctions=trending_auctions)\n\n@app.route('/status/<status_filter>')\ndef status_filter(status_filter):\n    filtered = [a for a in auctions.values() if a['status'].lower() == status_filter.lower()]\n    return render_template_string('Status filtered auctions: {{ filtered }}', filtered=filtered)\n\n# Testing code\n\nfrom flask.testing import FlaskClient\nclient = app.test_client()\n\nresults = {}\n\n# Test index\nr = client.get('/')\nresults['index_status'] = r.status_code\nresults['index_has_categories'] = 'Categories page' in r.get_data(as_text=True)\n\n# Test auction detail\nr = client.get('/auction/1')\nresults['auction1_status'] = r.status_code\nresults['auction1_title'] = 'Laptop' in r.get_data(as_text=True)\n\n# Test POST valid bid\nr = client.post('/auction/1', data={'bidder': 'Dan', 'amount': '600'})\nresults['bid_post_valid_status'] = r.status_code\nresults['bid_post_valid_response'] = 'Bid accepted' in r.get_data(as_text=True)\n\n# Test POST low bid\nr = client.post('/auction/1', data={'bidder': 'Dan', 'amount': '400'})\nresults['bid_post_low_status'] = r.status_code\nresults['bid_post_low_response'] = 'Bid too low' in r.get_data(as_text=True)\n\n# Test POST invalid amount\nr = client.post('/auction/1', data={'bidder': 'Dan', 'amount': 'abc'})\nresults['bid_post_invalid_status'] = r.status_code\nresults['bid_post_invalid_response'] = 'Invalid amount' in r.get_data(as_text=True)\n\n# Test categories\nr = client.get('/categories')\nresults['categories_status'] = r.status_code\nresults['categories_listed'] = 'Electronics' in r.get_data(as_text=True) and 'Art' in r.get_data(as_text=True)\n\n# Test trending\nr = client.get('/trending')\nresults['trending_status'] = r.status_code\nresults['trending_content'] = 'Trending auctions' in r.get_data(as_text=True)\n\n# Test status filter for open\nr = client.get('/status/open')\nresults['status_open_status'] = r.status_code\nresults['status_open_contains'] = 'Laptop' in r.get_data(as_text=True)\n\n# Test status filter for closed\nr = client.get('/status/closed')\nresults['status_closed_status'] = r.status_code\nresults['status_closed_contains'] = 'Painting' in r.get_data(as_text=True)\n\nprint(results)\n","timeout":20})

- '/auction/999' invalid auction details returns 500 Internal Server Error. (Issue)
- '/bid/history' returns 500 Internal Server Error. (Issue)
- '/categories' returns 200 with categories page.
- '/winners' returns 200 with winners page.
- '/winners?filter_name=Dave' returns 200 with filtered winners.
- '/trending' returns 200 with trending auctions.
- '/trending?time_range=Last Week' returns 200 with filtered trending auctions.
- '/status' returns 200 with all auctions status.
- '/status?status_filter=Closed' returns 200 with filtered auctions.
- '/auction/1/place_bid' GET returns 200 with place bid form.
- '/auction/999/place_bid' GET returns 500 Internal Server Error. (Issue)
- '/auction/1/place_bid' POST with valid bid redirects (302) appropriately.
- '/auction/1/place_bid' POST with invalid bid reloads form with 200.

Issues Summary:
- Several routes with invalid auction IDs (999) cause 500 Internal Server Error instead of a graceful 404 or error page.
- '/bid/history' route causes 500 Internal Server Error.

Recommendations:
- Add graceful error handling for invalid auction IDs in all relevant routes.
- Fix the internal server error in '/bid/history' route.

Overall status: NEED_MODIFY

- '/bid/history' route causes 500 Internal Server Error.

Recommendations:

- Fix the internal server error in '/bid/history' route.

1. Index page (/):

- Status 'closed' returns 200 and content: PASS

Summary:
- Major functionalities are implemented and accessible.
- Error handling for invalid bids during POST is returning 200 OK instead of appropriate 4xx error, indicating missing or ineffective error status codes.
- The GET place_bid page content check failed on exact keyword presence, may be a template or content issue.

Recommendations:

- Ensure place_bid GET route returns distinguishable content for reliable testing.
